mapper.insert:
insert into pm_cl_quesnaire_template_header (questionnairePassScore ,questionnaireTemplateName ,createdTime , effectiveEndTime ,questionnaireStatus ,questionnaireScore ,questionnaireTemplateNum , updatedTime ,effectiveStartTime,createdPerson,updatedPerson,quesType,markIndexs ) values(#{questionnairePassScore} ,#{questionnaireTemplateName} ,now() ,null , #{questionnaireStatus} ,#{questionnaireScore} ,#{questionnaireTemplateNum} ,null , now(),#{createdPerson},null,#{quesType},#{markIndexs} )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
mapper.select: select COLUMN_NAME as tableColumnName,DATA_TYPE as tableColumnType from `information_schema`.`columns` where table_name=#{tableName}
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_tb_project
drop table if exists tmp_tb_shipstate
mapper.sql:
<if test=" compareValue="10" projectState>
SELECT `ph`.`projectId` AS `projectId`, `ph`.`projectCode` AS `projectCode`, `rank`.`basicDataName` AS `rank`, ( CASE WHEN ( `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` IS NOT NULL ) THEN CONCAT( `ph`.`projectName`, '-', `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` ) ELSE `ph`.`projectName` END ) AS `projectName`, majorProjectLevel, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `ph`.`projectState` AS `projectState`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT `pc`.`contractNo` SEPARATOR ',') AS `contractNo`, `ph`.`column005` AS `systemName`, `ph`.compId, `ph`.`column001` AS `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName`, `pm`.`memberCode` AS `salesManCode`, `pm`.`memberName` AS `salesManName`, `pm2`.`memberCode` AS `serviceManager`, `pm2`.`memberName` AS `serviceManagerName`, `pm3`.`memberCode` AS `projectManager`, `pm3`.`memberName` AS `projectManagerName`, `gm`.`memberCode` AS `groupMember`, `gm`.`memberName` AS `groupMemberName`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT `gm`.`memberCode`) AS teamMemberCodes, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT `gm`.`memberName`) AS teamMemberNames, shipmentState.`basicDataName` AS shipmentStateName, state.`shipmentState`, planState.`basicDataName` AS planStateName, state.`projectPlanState`, executionState.`basicDataName` AS executionStateName, state.executionState, closeProcessState.`basicDataName` AS closeProcessStateName, state.closeProcessState, ph.projectStartTime, ph.createTime AS projectCreateTime, ph.projectRefreshTime, ph.projectCloseTime, CASE WHEN ph.column012 IS NULL AND ph.columno12_readonly = - 1 THEN ph.column012 WHEN ph.column012 IS NOT NULL THEN ph.column012 ELSE ph.columno12_readonly END AS ssfs, CASE WHEN ph.column012 IS NULL AND ph.columno12_readonly = - 1 THEN '未指定' WHEN ph.column012 IS NOT NULL THEN ssfs1.basicDataName ELSE ssfs2.basicDataName END AS ssfsName,
CONCAT_WS(",", IF(prp1.partyName = '', NULL, prp1.partyName), IF(prp2.partyName = '', NULL, prp2.partyName) ) partnerChannel, prp1.partyName as serviceChannel, prp2.partyName as agentChannel, ph.customInfo, <if test=" checkWarranty compareValue="true"> wcs.warrantyStatus, wcs.warrantyStatusName, wcs.warrantyGrade, wcs.warrantyGradeName, wcs.wafService, wcs.wafServiceName
<if test=" checkWarranty compareValue="true"> NULL AS warrantyStatus, NULL AS warrantyStatusName, NULL AS warrantyGrade, NULL AS warrantyGradeName, NULL AS wafService, NULL AS wafServiceName
FROM `pm_project_header` `ph` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `pr` ON `ph`.`projectCode` = `pr`.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` `pc` ON `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pc`.`projectGroupCode` <if test=" itemModel> INNER JOIN temp_tb_projectId_filter_itemModel ON filteredProjectId = ph.projectId
<if test=" barCode>
INNER JOIN (SELECT `c`.`contract_code` AS `contractNo`, profitCenter FROM `fb_shipment_barcode` `sb` LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment` `s` ON `s`.`packlist_id` = `sb`.`pack_id` LEFT JOIN `fb_contract` `c` ON `c`.`contract_id` = `s`.`con_id` WHERE (barcode = #{barCode} or barcode2 = #{barCode}) AND ( ISNULL(`sb`.`rma_no`) OR `sb`.`rma_no` = '' OR `sb`.`rma_no` = 'null' )) sc
ON sc.contractNo = REPLACE(REPLACE(pc.`contractNo`, "-L", ""), "-C", "") AND CASE WHEN ph.salesType = '14' THEN sc.profitCenter = ph.column001 ELSE 1 = 1 END
<if test=" checkWarranty compareValue="true"> INNER JOIN temp_tb_project_contractWarrantyState wcs ON wcs.projectId = ph.projectId <if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyStatus> wcs.warrantyStatus = #{warrantyStatus} <if test=" prepend="AND" warrantyGrade> wcs.warrantyGrade = #{warrantyGrade} <if test=" prepend="AND" wafService> wcs.wafService = #{wafService}
LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` `pg` ON `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pg`.`projectGroupCode` AND `pg`.`projectType` = '10' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON `fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02' AND `fd`.`basicDataId` = `ph`.`projectState` AND `fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ( `fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `rank` ON `rank`.`dataTypeCode` = '05' AND `rank`.`basicDataId` = `ph`.`column010` AND `rank`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND ( `rank`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`rank`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON `d`.`departmentNum` = `ph`.`column001` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` `pm` ON `pm`.`memberRole` = '10' AND `ph`.`projectId` = `pm`.`projectId` AND `pm`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ( `pm`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`pm`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` `pm2` ON `pm2`.`memberRole` = '20' AND `ph`.`projectId` = `pm2`.`projectId` AND `pm2`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ( `pm2`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`pm2`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` `pm3` ON `pm3`.`memberRole` = '30' AND `ph`.`projectId` = `pm3`.`projectId` AND `pm3`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ( `pm3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`pm3`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` `gm` ON `gm`.`memberRole` in ('10', '20', '30', '40') AND `ph`.`projectId` = `gm`.`projectId` AND `gm`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ( `gm`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`gm`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN pm_project_state state ON state.`projectId` = ph.projectId LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party prp1 ON prp1.partyRole = "20" AND prp1.projectId = ph.projectId AND prp1.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party prp2 ON prp2.partyRole = "30" AND prp2.projectId = ph.projectId AND prp2.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data shipmentState ON shipmentState.`dataTypeCode` = '20' AND shipmentState.`basicDataId` = state.`shipmentState` AND shipmentState.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data planState ON planState.`dataTypeCode` = '22' AND planState.`basicDataId` = state.`projectPlanState` AND planState.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data executionState ON executionState.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' AND executionState.`basicDataId` = state.`executionState` AND executionState.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data closeProcessState ON closeProcessState.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectCloseProcessState' AND closeProcessState.`basicDataId` = state.`closeProcessState` AND closeProcessState.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data ssfs1 ON ssfs1.dataTypeCode = '15' AND ssfs1.basicDataId = ph.column012 AND ssfs1.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data ssfs2 ON ssfs2.dataTypeCode = '15' AND ssfs2.basicDataId = ph.columno12_readonly AND ssfs2.effectiveTo IS NULL WHERE ISNULL(`ph`.`effectiveTo`)
<if test=" prepend="AND" projectId compareValue="0"> ph.projectId = #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="AND" memberCode open="(" close=")"> gm.memberCode = #{memberCode} <if test=" serviceManagerCode> <if test=" officeCodes> OR ( ph.column001 IN ($officeCodes$) AND ( ph.projectState = 20 OR ph.projectState = 100 ) )
<if test=" programManagerCode> <if test=" officeCodes> OR ( ph.column001 IN ($officeCodes$) AND ( ph.projectState = 20 OR ph.projectState = 100 ) )
<if test=" memberCode> <if test=" prepend="and" serviceManagerCode>
( (pm2.memberCode = #{serviceManagerCode} or pm3.`memberCode` = #{serviceManagerCode})
<if test=" officeCodes> OR ( ph.column001 IN ($officeCodes$) AND ( ph.projectState = 20 OR ph.projectState = 100 ) )
)
<if test=" prepend="and" programManagerCode>
( pm3.`memberCode` = #{programManagerCode}
<if test=" officeCodes> OR ( ph.column001 IN ($officeCodes$) AND ( ph.projectState = 20 OR ph.projectState = 100 ) )
)
<if test=" property="customInfo.isProjectViewer"> <if test=" prepend="and" officeCodes> ph.column001 IN ($officeCodes$)
<if test=" prepend="and" oldServiceManagerCode> (pm2.memberCode = #{oldServiceManagerCode} or pm3.memberCode = #{oldServiceManagerCode})
<if test=" prepend="and" oldProgramManagerCode> pm3.memberCode = #{oldProgramManagerCode} <if test=" prepend="and" projectState> FIND_IN_SET(ph.projectState, #{projectState} ) <if test=" prepend="and" projectPlanState> state.projectPlanState = #{projectPlanState} <if test=" compareValue="0" prepend="and" shipmentState> state.shipmentState = #{shipmentState} <if test=" prepend="and" executionState> state.executionState = #{executionState} <if test=" prepend="and" closeProcessState> state.closeProcessState = #{closeProcessState} <if test=" prepend="and" column001> ph.column001 = #{column001} <if test=" prepend="and" column004> ph.column004 = #{column004} <if test=" prepend="and" column005> ph.column005 = #{column005} <if test=" prepend="and" column006> ph.column006 = #{column006} <if test=" prepend="and" column007> ph.column007 = #{column007} <if test=" prepend="and" column011> ph.column011 = #{column011} <if test=" prepend="and" majorProjectLevel> ph.majorProjectLevel = #{majorProjectLevel} <if test=" prepend="and" compId> ph.compId = #{compId}
GROUP BY `ph`.`projectCode`
<if test=" compareValue="10" projectState>
SELECT DISTINCT NULL AS `projectId`, NULL AS `projectCode`, NULL AS `rank`, IFNULL(IF(p.salesType = '01', p.projectName, pp.projectName), p.projectName) AS `projectName`, pp.majorProjectLevel AS `majorProjectLevel`, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `fd`.`basicDataId` AS `projectState`, `p`.`contractNo` AS `contractNo`, IFNULL(c1.id, c2.id) AS compId, `pp`.`officeCode` AS `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName`, `pp`.`salesManCode` AS `salesManCode`, `pp`.`salesManName` AS `salesManName`, NULL AS `projectStartTime`, NULL as projectCreateTime, `pp`.`systemName` AS `systemName`, NULL AS `serviceManager`, NULL AS `serviceManagerName`, NULL AS `projectManager`, NULL AS `projectManagerName`, NULL AS `groupMember`, NULL AS `groupMemberName`, NULL AS teamMemberCodes, NULL AS teamMemberNames, NULL as shipmentStateName, NULL as shipmentState, NULL as planStateName, NULL as projectPlanState, NULL AS executionStateName, NULL as executionState, NULL AS closeProcessStateName, NULL as closeProcessState, NULL as projectRefreshTime, NULL as projectCloseTime, null ssfs , null ssfsName, null partnerChannel, null serviceChannel, null agentChannel, null customInfo, null AS warrantyStatus, null AS warrantyStatusName, null AS warrantyGrade, null AS warrantyGradeName, null AS wafService, null AS wafServiceName FROM `view_distinct_contract` `v` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` ON ((`v`.`id` = `p`.`id`)) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` `pp` ON ((`p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber`)) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON ((`pp`.`officeCode` = `d`.`departmentNum`)) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON (`fd`.`basicDataId` = '10') AND (`fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02') AND (`fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ((`fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`)) LEFT JOIN fnd_company c1 ON c1.code = p.compCode LEFT JOIN fnd_company c2 ON c2.`code` = pp.corporationCode WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM (`pm_project_contract` `t1` JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` ON ((`t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode`))) JOIN `pm_project_header` `t3`
ON (
`t3`.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
AND (`t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ((`t3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`t3`.`effectiveTo`)) WHERE (`p`.`contractNo` = `t1`.`contractNo`)) AND v.contractNo IS NOT NULL;
<if test=" prepend="UNION ALL" projectState> <if test=" projectId compareValue="0">
SELECT DISTINCT NULL AS `projectId`, NULL AS `projectCode`, NULL AS `rank`, IFNULL(IF(p.salesType = '01', p.projectName, pp.projectName), p.projectName) AS `projectName`, pp.majorProjectLevel AS `majorProjectLevel`, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `fd`.`basicDataId` AS `projectState`, `p`.`contractNo` AS `contractNo`, IFNULL(c1.id, c2.id) AS compId, `pp`.`officeCode` AS `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName`, `pp`.`salesManCode` AS `salesManCode`, `pp`.`salesManName` AS `salesManName`, NULL AS `projectStartTime`, NULL as projectCreateTime, `pp`.`systemName` AS `systemName`, NULL AS `serviceManager`, NULL AS `serviceManagerName`, NULL AS `projectManager`, NULL AS `projectManagerName`, NULL AS `groupMember`, NULL AS `groupMemberName`, NULL AS teamMemberCodes, NULL AS teamMemberNames, NULL as shipmentStateName, NULL as shipmentState, NULL as planStateName, NULL as projectPlanState, NULL AS executionStateName, NULL as executionState, NULL AS closeProcessStateName, NULL as closeProcessState, NULL as projectRefreshTime,NULL as projectCloseTime, null ssfs , null ssfsName, null partnerChannel, null serviceChannel, null agentChannel, null customInfo, null AS warrantyStatus, null AS warrantyStatusName, null AS warrantyGrade, null AS warrantyGradeName, null AS wafService, null AS wafServiceName FROM `view_distinct_contract` `v` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` `p` ON ((`v`.`id` = `p`.`id`)) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` `pp` ON ((`p`.`orderExecNumber` = `pp`.`orderExecNumber`)) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON ((`pp`.`officeCode` = `d`.`departmentNum`)) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON (`fd`.`basicDataId` = '10') AND (`fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02') AND (`fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ((`fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`)) LEFT JOIN fnd_company c1 ON c1.code = p.compCode LEFT JOIN fnd_company c2 ON c2.`code` = pp.corporationCode WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM (`pm_project_contract` `t1` JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` ON ((`t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode`))) JOIN `pm_project_header` `t3`
ON (
`t3`.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
AND (`t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ((`t3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`t3`.`effectiveTo`)) WHERE (`p`.`contractNo` = `t1`.`contractNo`)) AND v.contractNo IS NOT NULL;

left join fnd_company cc on cc.id = t1.compId
where projectId > 0
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.customInfo.fullProjectName"> projectName = #project.projectName# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.projectName"> projectName like CONCAT('%', #project.projectName#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.projectState"> FIND_IN_SET(projectState, #project.projectState# ) <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.projectPlanState"> projectPlanState = #project.projectPlanState# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.column001"> officeCode = #project.column001# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.contractNo"> (contractNo like CONCAT('%', #project.contractNo#, '%') or projectCode like CONCAT('%', #project.contractNo#, '%')) <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.salesManCode"> salesManCode like CONCAT('%', #project.salesManCode#)
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="project.memberCode" open="(" close=")"> groupMember = #project.memberCode# <if test=" property="project.serviceManagerCode"> <if test=" property="project.officeCodes"> OR ( officeCode IN ($project.officeCodes$) AND ( projectState = 20 or projectState = 100 ) )
<if test=" property="project.programManagerCode"> <if test=" property="project.officeCodes"> OR ( officeCode IN ($project.officeCodes$) AND ( projectState = 20 OR projectState = 100 ) )
<if test=" property="project.memberCode"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.serviceManagerCode">
( (serviceManager = #project.serviceManagerCode# or projectManager = #project.serviceManagerCode#)
<if test=" property="project.officeCodes"> OR ( officeCode IN ($project.officeCodes$) AND ( projectState = 20 or projectState = 100 ) )
)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.programManagerCode">
( projectManager = #project.programManagerCode#
<if test=" property="project.officeCodes"> OR ( officeCode IN ($project.officeCodes$) AND ( projectState = 20 OR projectState = 100 ) )
)
<if test=" property="project.customInfo.isProjectViewer"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.officeCodes"> t1.officeCode IN ($project.officeCodes$)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.oldServiceManagerCode"> (serviceManager = #project.oldServiceManagerCode# or projectManager = #project.oldServiceManagerCode#)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.oldProgramManagerCode"> projectManager = #project.oldProgramManagerCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.column010"> rank = #project.column010# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.majorProjectLevel"> majorProjectLevel = #project.majorProjectLevel# <if test=" compareValue="0" prepend="and" property="project.shipmentState"> shipmentState = #project.shipmentState# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.createStartTime"> projectCreateTime > #project.createStartTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.createEndTime"> projectCreateTime < #project.createEndTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.refreshStartTime"> projectRefreshTime > #project.refreshStartTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.refreshEndTime"> projectRefreshTime < #project.refreshEndTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.closeStartTime"> projectCloseTime > #project.closeStartTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.closeEndTime"> projectCloseTime < #project.closeEndTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.column012"> ssfs = #project.column012#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.compId"> compId = #project.compId# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.partnerChannel"> partnerChannel like CONCAT("%", #project.partnerChannel#, "%") order by projectManager ASC , projectStartTime DESC ,rank DESC <if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.update: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tmp_tb_project

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tmp_tb_shipstate SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(openQuantity) = 0 THEN -1 WHEN SUM(openQuantity) = SUM(orderQuantity) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS deliverstate , projectId FROM pm_project_product_line GROUP BY projectId
mapper.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_tb_contractNo_filter_itemModel(KEY filteredContractNo(filteredContractNo))
SELECT DISTINCT od.`contractNo` AS filteredContractNo FROM `fb_items` fi LEFT JOIN `pm_order_line_from_sap` ol ON ol.`itemCode` = fi.`item` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` od ON od.`orderNumber` = ol.`orderNumber` AND od.orderType = ol.lineType AND od.`orderType` = 0 AND od.compCode = ol.compCode WHERE fi.`itemname` LIKE CONCAT(#{itemModel}, "%") AND od.`id` IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_tb_contractNo_filter_itemModel
mapper.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_tb_projectId_filter_itemModel(KEY filteredProjectId(filteredProjectId))
SELECT DISTINCT pppl.projectId AS filteredProjectId FROM `fb_items` fi LEFT JOIN `pm_project_product_line` pppl ON pppl.`itemCode` = fi.`item` WHERE fi.`itemname` LIKE CONCAT("%", #{itemModel}, "%") UNION SELECT DISTINCT pppl.projectId AS filteredProjectId FROM `pm_project_product_line_real` pppl WHERE pppl.productSubModel LIKE CONCAT("%", #{itemModel}, "%")
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_tb_projectId_filter_itemModel
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tmb_project_service_agent_channel ( KEY projectId(projectId) ) AS SELECT projectId, GROUP_CONCAT(IF(partyName = '', NULL, partyName)) AS partnerChannel FROM `pm_project_related_party` WHERE effectiveTo IS NULL AND partyRole IN (20, 30) GROUP BY projectId
mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_tb_project_partnerChannel
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_tb_project_contractWarrantyState( KEY projectId(projectId), KEY warrantyStatus(warrantyStatus), KEY warrantyGrade(warrantyGrade), KEY wafService(wafService) ) AS select ph.`projectId`, ph.`projectName`, sum(distinct wcs.`diff`) warrantyStatus, IF(sum(distinct wcs.`diff`) = - 1, '维保内', IF(sum(distinct wcs.`diff`) = 0, '部分保外', IF(sum(distinct wcs.`diff`) = 1, '维保外', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyStatusName, max(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) warrantyGrade, IF(max(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = - 1, '基本维保', IF(max(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 0, '中级维保', IF(max(wcs.`warrantyGrade`) = 1, '高级维保', NULL) ) ) AS warrantyGradeName, IFNULL(max(wcs.`wafService`), 0) wafService, IF(max(wcs.`wafService`) = 1, "策略调优服务", NULL) as wafServiceName from `pm_project_header` ph left join `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr on ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` left join `pm_project_contract` pc on pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` left join `view_warranty_contract_state` wcs on wcs.`contractNo` = REPLACE(REPLACE(pc.`contractNo`, "-C", ""), "-L", "") where ph.`effectiveTo` is null group by pgr.`projectCode`;
mapper.update: ALTER TABLE tmp_tb_project ADD INDEX index1(projectId)
ALTER TABLE tmp_tb_shipstate ADD INDEX index2(projectId)
mapper.select:
select t1.* , c.abbr as compName from tmp_tb_project t1
left join fnd_company c on c.id = t1.compId
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.customInfo.fullProjectName"> projectName = #project.projectName# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.projectName"> projectName like CONCAT('%', #project.projectName#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.projectState"> FIND_IN_SET(projectState, #project.projectState# ) <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.projectPlanState"> projectPlanState = #project.projectPlanState# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.column001"> officeCode = #project.column001#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.contractNo"> (contractNo like CONCAT('%', #project.contractNo#, '%') or projectCode like CONCAT('%', #project.contractNo#, '%')) <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.salesManCode"> salesManCode like CONCAT('%', #project.salesManCode#) <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.serviceManagerCode"> serviceManager = #project.serviceManagerCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.programManagerCode"> projectManager = #project.programManagerCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.column010"> rank = #project.column010# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.majorProjectLevel"> majorProjectLevel = #project.majorProjectLevel# <if test=" compareValue="0" prepend="and" property="project.shipmentState"> shipmentState = #project.shipmentState# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.createStartTime"> projectCreateTime >= #project.createStartTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.createEndTime"> projectCreateTime <= #project.createEndTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.refreshStartTime"> projectRefreshTime >= #project.refreshStartTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.refreshEndTime"> projectRefreshTime <= #project.refreshEndTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.closeStartTime"> projectCloseTime >= #project.closeStartTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.closeEndTime"> projectCloseTime <= #project.closeEndTime# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.column012"> ssfs = #project.column012#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="project.compId"> compId = #project.compId# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.partnerChannel"> partnerChannel like CONCAT("%", #project.partnerChannel#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.executionState"> executionState = #project.executionState# <if test=" prepend="and" property="project.closeProcessState"> closeProcessState = #project.closeProcessState#
ORDER BY rank ,projectStartTime DESC <if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
SELECT count(*) FROM tmp_tb_project t1
SELECT t1.*, cc.abbr as compName FROM tmp_tb_project t1
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_header (projectCode, projectName, projectState,isback, column001, column002, column003, column004, column005, column006, column007, column008, column009, column010, column011, column012, columno12_readonly, column013, salesType, customerProjectName, majorProjectLevel, compId, createTime, createBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo) values (#{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{projectState},#{isback} ,#{column001}, #{column002}, #{column003}, #{column004}, #{column005}, #{column006}, #{column007}, #{column008}, #{column009}, #{column010}, #{column011}, #{column012},#{column012Readonly}, #{column013}, #{salesType}, #{customerProjectName}, #{majorProjectLevel}, #{compId}, NOW(), #{createBy} , NOW(), NULL, #customInfo:JSON#)
SELECT last_insert_id() as id

insert into pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line (createdTime ,questionContent ,questionRemark ,effectiveEndTime , questionScore ,createdPerson ,effectiveStartTime ,questionNum ,quesnaireTemplateHeaderId , questionStatus ,questionType ,updatedPerson ,updatedTime,questionTypeForCB ) values(now() ,#{questionContent} ,#{questionRemark} ,null , #{questionScore} ,#{createdPerson} ,now() ,#{questionNum} ,#{quesnaireTemplateHeaderId} , #{questionStatus} ,#{questionType} ,null ,null,#{questionTypeForCB})
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;

insert into pm_cl_quesnaire_template_options (questionOptionScore ,questionOptionsContent , questionId ,createdTime ,effectiveEndTime , quesnaireTemplateHeaderId ,questionOptionNum ,updatedPerson , createdPerson ,updatedTime ,effectiveStartTime ) values
(#pmClosedLoopQuesnaireOptList[].questionOptionScore# ,#pmClosedLoopQuesnaireOptList[].questionOptionsContent# , #{questionId} ,now() ,null , #pmClosedLoopQuesnaireOptList[].quesnaireTemplateHeaderId# ,#pmClosedLoopQuesnaireOptList[].questionOptionNum# ,null , null , null ,now() )
mapper.select: SELECT salesManCode,salesmanTel,salesManName , CASE WHEN (POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail) >0 AND POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail)>0) THEN ( CASE WHEN POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail) > POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail) THEN LEFT(salesmanMail,POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail)+2) ELSE RIGHT(salesmanMail,(LENGTH(salesmanMail)-(POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail)+2))) END) WHEN (POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail) >0 AND POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail) = 0) THEN salesmanMail ELSE salesmanMail END AS salesmanMail FROM pm_person_from_oa

SELECT * , CONCAT( i.`instructionsUser`, '-', pp.`realName` ) AS instructionsUser2 FROM pm_project_instruction i LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` pp ON i.`instructionsUser` = pp.`username` WHERE projectId = #{porjectId} AND dataType = 0;

SELECT * , CONCAT( i.`instructionsUser`, '-', pp.`realName` ) AS instructionsUser2 FROM pm_project_instruction i LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` pp ON i.`instructionsUser` = pp.`username` WHERE instructionsId = #{instructionId} AND dataType = 1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_group (projectGroupCode, projectGroupName, projectType, createTime, createBy) values (#{projectGroupCode}, #{projectGroupName}, #{projectType}, NOW(), #{createBy})
insert into pm_project_contract (contractNo, projectGroupCode, createTime, createBy) values (#{contractNo}, #{projectGroupCode}, NOW(), #{createBy} )

insert into pm_project_group_relationship (projectGroupCode, projectCode, smsProjectCode, createTime, createBy) values(#{projectGroupCode}, #{projectCode}, #{smsProjectCode}, #{createTime}, #{createBy})

insert into pm_project_member (projectId, memberRole, memberCode, memberName, phoneNum, email, fromFlag, createTime, createBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo) values(#{projectId}, #{memberRole}, #{memberCode}, #{memberName}, #{phoneNum}, #{email}, #{fromFlag}, NOW(), #{createBy} , NOW(), #{effectiveTo})
mapper.select: select projectGroupCode from pm_project_group order by id desc limit 1
select max(id) from pm_project_group

SELECT t1.basicDataName AS serviceType, pppfs.agentName, pppfs.customerProjectName, IFNULL(pppfs.majorProjectLevel, "无") majorProjectLevel, podfs.contractNo contractNo, CASE WHEN pppfs.projectCode IS NULL THEN podfs.contractNo ELSE pppfs.projectCode END AS projectCode, IFNULL(IF(podfs.salesType = '01', podfs.projectName, pppfs.projectName), podfs.projectName) AS projectName, podfs.orderCreateTime orderCreateTime, podfs.customerCode customerCode, podfs.customerName customerName, pppfs.salesManCode salesManCode, pppfs.salesManName salesManName, pppfs.marketCode marketCode, pppfs.marketName marketName, pppfs.systemId systemId, pppfs.systemName systemName, pppfs.expendId expendId, pppfs.expendName expendName, pppfs.industryId, pppfs.industryName industryName, pppfs.officeCode officeCode, fd.departmentName officeName, ppm.memberCode memberCode, ppm.memberName memberName, pph.column008 column008, pph.column010 column010, pph.column011 column011, pph.column012 column012, TRIM(IF(TRIM(IFNULL(pppfs.finalCustomerName, "")) > "", pppfs.finalCustomerName, pph.column013)) column013, podfs.compCode, c.id AS compId, podfs.salesType, concat("{'smsProjectAmount':'", IFNULL(pppfs.projectMoney, 0), "'}") as customInfo FROM pm_order_data_from_sap podfs LEFT JOIN pm_project_property_from_sms pppfs ON podfs.orderExecNumber = pppfs.orderExecNumber LEFT JOIN pm_project_header pph ON podfs.contractNo = pph.projectCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.departmentNum = pppfs.officeCode LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm ON pph.projectId = ppm.projectId AND ppm.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm.effectiveTo IS NULL) LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t1 ON pppfs.serviceTypeName = t1.basicDataId AND t1.dataTypeCode = 21 AND t1.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( t1.effectiveTo > NOW() OR t1.effectiveTo IS NULL ) LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.code = podfs.compCode where podfs.contractNo = #{contractNo} AND podfs.`orderType` = 0 order by podfs.id desc limit 1

SELECT t1.basicDataName AS serviceType, pppfs.agentName, pppfs.customerProjectName, IFNULL(pppfs.majorProjectLevel, "无") majorProjectLevel, podfs.contractNo contractNo, CASE WHEN pppfs.projectCode IS NULL THEN podfs.contractNo ELSE pppfs.projectCode END AS projectCode, IFNULL(IF(podfs.salesType = '01', podfs.projectName, pppfs.projectName), podfs.projectName) AS projectName, podfs.orderCreateTime orderCreateTime, podfs.customerCode customerCode, podfs.customerName customerName, pppfs.salesManCode salesManCode, pppfs.salesManName salesManName, pppfs.marketCode marketCode, pppfs.marketName marketName, pppfs.systemId systemId, pppfs.systemName systemName, pppfs.expendId expendId, pppfs.expendName expendName, pppfs.industryId, pppfs.industryName industryName, pppfs.officeCode officeCode, fd.departmentName officeName, ppm.memberCode memberCode, ppm.memberName memberName, pph.column008 column008, pph.column010 column010, pph.column011 column011, pph.column012 column012, TRIM(IF(TRIM(IFNULL(pppfs.finalCustomerName, "")) > "", pppfs.finalCustomerName, pph.column013)) column013, podfs.compCode, c.id AS compId, podfs.salesType, concat("{'smsProjectAmount':'", IFNULL(pppfs.projectMoney, 0), "'}") as customInfo FROM pm_order_data_from_sap podfs LEFT JOIN pm_project_property_from_sms pppfs ON podfs.orderExecNumber = pppfs.orderExecNumber LEFT JOIN pm_project_header pph ON podfs.contractNo = pph.projectCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.departmentNum = pppfs.officeCode LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm ON pph.projectId = ppm.projectId AND ppm.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm.effectiveTo IS NULL) LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t1 ON pppfs.serviceTypeName = t1.basicDataId AND t1.dataTypeCode = 21 AND t1.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( t1.effectiveTo > NOW() OR t1.effectiveTo IS NULL ) LEFT JOIN fnd_company c ON c.code = podfs.compCode where podfs.contractNo = #{contractNo} AND podfs.`orderType` = 0
<if test=" prepend="and" projectType> pppfs.projectType = #{projectType} order by podfs.id desc limit 1
select projectName from pm_project_header where projectId = #{projectId} limit 1

SELECT pph.projectId,CASE WHEN pph.effectiveFrom < NOW() AND (pph.effectiveTo >= NOW() OR pph.effectiveTo IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS projectStatus, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ppc.contractNo) AS contractNo, pph.projectCode, CASE WHEN ppgr.`mergeBranchMark` IS NULL THEN pph.projectName ELSE CONCAT( pph.projectName, '-',ppgr.`mergeBranchMark` ) END AS projectName , pph.projectState,state.`basicDataName` AS projectStateName, pph.isback, pph.isback, pph.column001, fd.departmentName, pph.column002, pph.column003, pph.column004, pph.column005, pph.column006, pph.column007, pph.column008, pph.column009, pph.column010, pph.column011,case when pph.column012 is null or pph.column012 = '' then pph.columno12_readonly else pph.column012 end as column012, pph.columno12_readonly, pph.column013, pph.column014, pph.compId, pph.customerProjectName, pph.majorProjectLevel, pph.salesType, case when ppm1.memberCode is null then ppm4.memberCode else ppm1.memberCode end as serviceManagerCode, case when ppm1.memberName is null then ppm4.memberName else ppm1.memberName end as serviceManagerCodeforjson, case when ppm2.memberCode is null then ppm5.memberCode else ppm2.memberCode end as programManagerCode, case when ppm2.memberName is null then ppm5.memberName else ppm2.memberName end as programManagerCodeforjson, ppm5.memberCode as programManagerCodeB, ppm5.memberName as programManagerCodeforjsonB, pph.projectStartTime, case when ppm3.memberCode is null then ppm6.memberCode else ppm3.memberCode end as salesManCode, case when ppm3.memberName is null then ppm6.memberName else ppm3.memberName end as salesManName, pprp1.partyName partyName1, pprp2.partyName partyName2, pprp3.partyName partyName3, executionState.`basicDataName` AS executionStateName, ps.executionState, closeProcessState.`basicDataName` AS closeProcessStateName, ps.closeProcessState , pph.customInfo FROM pm_project_header pph LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm1 ON ppm1.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm1.memberRole = '20' AND ppm1.fromFlag = 1 AND (ppm1.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm1.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm1.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm4 ON ppm4.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm4.memberRole = '20' AND ppm4.fromFlag = 2 AND (ppm4.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm4.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm4.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm2 ON ppm2.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm2.memberRole = '30' AND ppm2.fromFlag = 1 AND (ppm2.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm2.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm2.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm5 ON ppm5.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm5.memberRole = '30' AND ppm5.fromFlag = 2 AND (ppm5.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm5.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm5.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm3 ON ppm3.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm3.memberRole = '10' AND ppm3.fromFlag = 1 AND (ppm3.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm3.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm3.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm6 ON ppm6.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm6.memberRole = '10' AND ppm6.fromFlag = 2 AND (ppm6.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm6.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppm6.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship ppgr ON ppgr.projectCode = pph.projectCode LEFT JOIN pm_project_contract ppc ON ppc.projectGroupCode = ppgr.projectGroupCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.departmentNum = pph.column001 LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party pprp1 ON pprp1.projectId = pph.projectId AND pprp1.partyRole = '10' AND (pprp1.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (pprp1.effectiveTo > NOW() OR pprp1.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party pprp2 ON pprp2.projectId = pph.projectId AND pprp2.partyRole = '20' AND (pprp2.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (pprp2.effectiveTo > NOW() OR pprp2.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party pprp3 ON pprp3.projectId = pph.projectId AND pprp3.partyRole = '30' AND (pprp3.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (pprp3.effectiveTo > NOW() OR pprp3.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` state ON state.`basicDataId` = pph.projectState AND state.`dataTypeCode` = '02' LEFT JOIN `pm_project_state` ps ON ps.projectId = pph.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data executionState ON executionState.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' AND executionState.`basicDataId` = ps.`executionState` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data closeProcessState ON closeProcessState.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectCloseProcessState' AND closeProcessState.`basicDataId` = ps.`closeProcessState` WHERE pph.projectId = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
insert into `pm_project_weekly_content`(`weeklyId`,`optionDesc001`,`optionDesc002`,`optionType`,`createTime`,`createBy`,`effectiveFrom`) values
( #{weeklyId},#list[].optionDesc001# ,#list[].optionDesc002# ,#{optionType} ,now() ,#{createBy} ,now() )
mapper.select: SELECT * ,case when weeklyState = 0 then '草稿' else '已提交' end as weeklyStateName FROM `pm_project_weekly` where weeklyId = #{weeklyId}
SELECT * FROM pm_project_weekly_content WHERE weeklyId = #{weeklyId} AND optionType = #{optionType} AND (effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (effectiveTo IS NULL OR effectiveTo > NOW()))
mapper.update: update pm_project_weekly_content set effectiveTo = now() where weeklyId = #{weeklyId} and optionType != 6
update pm_project_weekly_content set effectiveTo = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `pm_project_weekly_feedback`(`weeklyId`,`feedback`,`feedbacker`,`feedbackTime`) VALUES(#{weeklyId} ,#{feedback} ,#{feedbacker} ,now())
mapper.select: SELECT a.* , b.`realName` AS feedbackName FROM pm_project_weekly_feedback a LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info b ON a.`feedbacker` = b.`username` WHERE weeklyId = #{weeklyId}
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_cl_quesnaire_result_header (evaluationHeaderId ,quesnaireTemplateHeaderId, quesMarkScore,quesMarkResult,status ,createdTime, createdPerson) values(#{evaluationHeaderId} ,#{quesnaireTemplateHeaderId}, #{quesMarkScore},#{quesMarkResult},#{status}, now(), #{createdPerson})
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;

insert into pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line (quesnaireTemplateLineId ,questionAnswer ,quesnaireTemplateHeaderId ,questionScore ,questionTemplateOptId,quesnaireResultHeaderId, quesTypeForCB,quesEvaResult ,createdTime ) values
(#pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].quesnaireTemplateLineId# ,#pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].questionAnswer# , IFNULL(#{pmClQuesnaireTemplateHeaderId}, #pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].quesnaireTemplateHeaderId#), #pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].questionScore#, #pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].questionTemplateOptId# ,#{pmClQuesnaireResultHeaderId}, #pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].quesTypeForCB#,#pmClQuesnaireResultLineList[].quesEvaResult# ,now())
mapper.select:
select a.*, c.evaluationPeopleId as applyPersonId,c.evaluationPeopleName as applyPersonName,c.evaluationTime as applyTime , t2.departmentName AS officeName ,mm.memberName, CASE WHEN t1.column012 IS NULL AND t1.columno12_readonly = - 1 THEN t1.column012 WHEN t1.column012 IS NOT NULL THEN t1.column012 ELSE t1.columno12_readonly END AS implType
FROM pm_cl_evaluation_header a INNER JOIN (SELECT <if test=" sqlText compareValue="desc"> MAX(id) AS id
<if test=" sqlText compareValue="asc"> MIN(id) AS id
FROM pm_cl_evaluation_header GROUP BY projectId) b ON b.id = a.id
left join pm_cl_evaluation_header c on a.applyHeaderId=c.id join pm_project_header t1 on c.projectId = t1.projectId and t1.projectState != 20 LEFT JOIN temp_final_customer mm ON mm.projectId = t1.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_department t2 ON t1.column001 = t2.departmentNum AND t2.`status` = 1
<if test=" prepend="and" property="pmClEvaluationHeader.evaluationType" compareValue="0"> a.evaluationType=#pmClEvaluationHeader.evaluationType#
group by a.projectCode
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS temp_final_customer (KEY projectId (projectId)) SELECT m.projectId, GROUP_CONCAT(m.memberName) AS memberName FROM pm_project_member m WHERE m.effectiveTo IS NULL AND m.memberRole = '60' GROUP BY m.projectId
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_customer
mapper.select: select distinct pppfs.id, pppfs.contractNo, pppfs.batchCode, pppfs.basicDataName, pppfs.referenceEventName, pppfs.eventPlanHappenDate, pppfs.afterDaysNum, pppfs.eventActualFinishDate, pppfs.marketingFeedback from pm_pb_plan_from_sms pppfs left join fnd_basic_data fbd on fbd.basicDataName = pppfs.referenceEventName where pppfs.contractNo in ($contractNo$) and fbd.dataTypeCode is not null
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_related_party (projectId, partyRole, partyCode, partyName, createTime, createBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo) values (#{projectId}, #{partyRole}, #{partyCode}, #{partyName}, NOW(), #{createBy}, NOW(), #{effectiveTo})
mapper.update: update pm_project_header set isback = #{projectState} , updateTime = now(), updateBy = #{updateBy} where projectId = #{projectId}
mapper.select: select isback from pm_project_header where projectId = #{projectId}

SELECT podfs.contractNo contractNo, polfs.itemCode itemCode, polfs.itemDesc itemName, fi.itemname as model, polfs.orderQuantity orderQuantity, polfs.openQuantity openQuantity, polfs.orderNumber orderNumber, polfs.lineNum lineNum, ( polfs.orderQuantity - polfs.openQuantity ) deliverQuantity FROM pm_order_line_from_sap polfs LEFT JOIN pm_order_data_from_sap podfs ON polfs.orderNumber = podfs.orderNumber AND podfs.orderType = polfs.lineType AND podfs.`orderType` = 0 AND polfs.compCode = podfs.compCode LEFT JOIN fb_items fi on polfs.itemCode=fi.item WHERE podfs.contractNo = #{contractNo} and polfs.`lineType` = 0

SELECT t2.`contractNo` as rmaContractNo ,t1.`itemCode` ,t1.`itemDesc` as itemName, (0 - t1.orderQuantity) AS orderQuantity , t1.`openQuantity` ,t1.`orderNumber`,t1.`lineNum`,(t1.`openQuantity` - t1.`openQuantity`) deliverQuantity, #{contractNo} as contractNo FROM pm_order_line_from_sap t1 LEFT JOIN pm_order_data_from_sap t2 ON t1.`orderNumber` = t2.`orderNumber` AND t1.`lineType` = t2.`orderType` AND t1.compCode = t2.compCode WHERE t2.`orderComment` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{contractNo}, '%') AND t2.`orderType` = 1 UNION ALL SELECT a1.`contractNo` AS rmaContractNo , a2.`itemCode` ,a2.`itemDesc` AS itemName,(0-a2.`orderQuantity`) AS orderQuantity, a2.`openQuantity`,a2.`orderNumber` ,a2.`lineNum`,0 AS deliverQuantity, #{contractNo} AS contractNo FROM pm_order_data_from_sap a1 LEFT JOIN pm_order_line_from_sap a2 ON a1.`orderNumber` = a2.`orderNumber` AND a1.orderType = a2.lineType AND a1.compCode = a2.compCode WHERE a1.`contractNo` = #{contractNo} AND a1.`orderType` = 1 AND a2.`lineType` =1;
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_product_line (projectId, contractNo, itemCode, itemName, orderQuantity, deliverQuantity, openQuantity, orderNumber, lineNum) values (#{projectId}, #{contractNo}, #{itemCode}, #{itemName}, #{orderQuantity}, #{deliverQuantity}, #{openQuantity}, #{orderNumber}, #{lineNum})
mapper.select: SELECT pppl.id, pppl.projectId AS projectId, pppl.contractNo, pppl.itemCode AS itemCode, pppl.itemName AS itemName , fi.itemname AS model, pppl.orderQuantity AS orderQuantity, pppl.deliverQuantity AS deliverQuantity, pppl.openQuantity AS openQuantity , CASE WHEN pppl.projectQuantity IS NULL THEN pppl.orderQuantity ELSE pppl.projectQuantity END AS projectQuantity FROM pm_project_product_line pppl LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON pppl.itemCode = fi.item WHERE pppl.projectId = #{projectId}

SELECT pppl.id, pppl.projectId projectId, pppl.contractNo, pppl.itemCode itemCode, pppl.itemName itemName, fi.itemname AS model, SUM(pppl.orderQuantity) AS orderQuantity, SUM(pppl.deliverQuantity) AS deliverQuantity, SUM(pppl.openQuantity) openQuantity, CASE WHEN pppl.projectQuantity IS NULL THEN SUM(pppl.orderQuantity) ELSE SUM(pppl.projectQuantity) END AS projectQuantity FROM pm_project_product_line pppl LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON pppl.itemCode = fi.item WHERE pppl.projectId = #{projectId} GROUP BY pppl.itemCode
mapper.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemModel, vsip.itemName itemName, vsep.receiveName receiveName, vsep.emsNum emsNum, vsep.packdate packdate, vsep.emsCompany emsCompany,NULL AS installAddress, NULL AS chProjectId, NULL AS chContractNo, NULL AS transferProjectId, NULL AS transferContractNo, -1 AS transferFlag, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 itemCode2, vsip.itemModel2 AS itemModel2, vsip.itemName2 itemName2 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNo$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode and contractNo in ($contractNo$) and projectId = #{projectId} ) <if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> vsip.profitCenter = #{profitCenter} UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT pps.`contractNo`,pps.`barcode`,pps.`itemCode`, fi0.itemname AS itemModel, pps.`itemName`,pps.`receiveName`,pps.`emsNum`,pps.`packdate`,pps.`emsCompany`,pps.`installAddress`, pps.chProjectId, pps.chContractNo, pps.transferProjectId, pps.transferContractNo, pps.transferFlag, sbr.`sn2` AS barCode2, sbr.`item2` AS itemCode2, fi.itemname AS itemModel2, fi.describe_ AS itemName2 FROM pm_project_shipment pps LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pps.contractNo, '-C', '') AND pps.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN fb_items fi0 ON fi0.`item` = pps.itemCode LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.`item` = sbr.`item2` WHERE contractNo in ($contractNo$) and projectId = #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="AND" excludeTransferOut compareValue="">transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code IN ($sourceContractNo$)
AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode)
mapper.select:
SELECT pps.*, vw.`warrantyStartTime`, vw.`warrantyEndTime`, vw.`warrantyMonth`, vw.`diff` AS warrantyDiff FROM (
) pps LEFT JOIN `view_warranty` vw ON vw.contract_code in ($sourceContractNo$) AND vw.`barcode` = pps.barcode ORDER BY transferFlag asc

select count(*) from ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, vsep.receiveName receiveName, vsep.emsNum emsNum, vsep.packdate packdate, vsep.emsCompany emsCompany,NULL AS installAddress FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNo$) ) t

select count(*) from ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, vsep.receiveName receiveName, vsep.emsNum emsNum, vsep.packdate packdate, vsep.emsCompany emsCompany,NULL AS installAddress FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNo$)
<if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> vsip.profitCenter = #{profitCenter} ) t

SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, CASE WHEN sv.conp IS NULL THEN t.`conp` ELSE sv.conp END AS conp,sv.conpBak,sv.conpChange, CASE WHEN sv.boot IS NULL THEN t.`boot` ELSE sv.boot END AS boot,sv.bootBak ,sv.bootChange, CASE WHEN sv.cpld IS NULL THEN t.`cpld` ELSE sv.cpld END AS cpld,sv.cpldBak , sv.cpldChange, CASE WHEN sv.pcb IS NULL THEN t.`pcb` ELSE sv.pcb END AS pcb ,sv.pcbBak ,sv.pcbChange, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 itemCode2, vsip.itemName2 itemName2 <if test=" queryAffectedProbs compareValue="true" prepend="," > () AS affectedProbs
<if test=" queryAffectedProbs compareValue="true" prepend="," > NULL AS affectedProbs FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId LEFT JOIN fb_soft_version t ON vsip.`barcode` = t.`serial_number` LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version sv ON vsip.`barcode` = sv.`barcode` AND sv.`datastate` = 1 <if test=" itemFilters> LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.item = vsip.itemCode
WHERE vsip.contract_code IN ($contractNo$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment WHERE vsip.barcode = barcode and projectId = #{projectId}) <if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> vsip.profitCenter = #{profitCenter} <if test=" prepend="AND" itemFilters>
UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT t1.`contractNo`,t1.`barcode`,t1.`itemCode`,t1.`itemName`, CASE WHEN sv.conp IS NULL THEN t2.`conp` ELSE sv.conp END AS conp, sv.conpBak ,sv.conpChange, CASE WHEN sv.boot IS NULL THEN t2.`boot` ELSE sv.boot END AS boot, sv.bootBak ,sv.bootChange, CASE WHEN sv.cpld IS NULL THEN t2.`cpld` ELSE sv.cpld END AS cpld, sv.cpldBak , sv.cpldChange, CASE WHEN sv.pcb IS NULL THEN t2.`pcb` ELSE sv.pcb END AS pcb , sv.pcbBak ,sv.pcbChange, sbr.sn2 AS barCode2, sbr.item2 AS itemCode2, f.describe_ AS itemName2 <if test=" queryAffectedProbs compareValue="true" prepend="," > () AS affectedProbs
<if test=" queryAffectedProbs compareValue="true" prepend="," > NULL AS affectedProbs FROM pm_project_shipment t1 LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(t1.contractNo, '-C', '') AND t1.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN fb_soft_version t2 ON t1.`barcode` = t2.`serial_number` LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version sv ON t1.`projectId` = sv.`projectId` AND t1.`barcode` = sv.`barcode` AND sv.`datastate` = 1 LEFT JOIN `fb_items` f ON f.item = sbr.item2 <if test=" itemFilters> LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON fi.item = t1.itemCode
WHERE t1.contractNo IN ($contractNo$) AND t1.projectId = #{projectId} AND t1.transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code IN ($sourceContractNo$) AND vsip.barcode = t1.barcode ) <if test=" prepend="AND" itemFilters>

SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, t.`conp`, null as conpBak, null as conpChange ,t.`boot` , null as bootBak , null as bootChange, t.`cpld`, null as cpldBak, null as cpldChange, t.`pcb` , null as pcbBak , null as pcbChange, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 itemCode2, vsip.itemName2 itemName2 , NULL AS affectedProbs FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId LEFT JOIN fb_soft_version t ON vsip.`barcode` = t.`serial_number` WHERE vsip.contract_code IN ($contractNo$) AND t.conp IS NOT NULL

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pm_project_soft_version(id, projectId ,logId, barcode ,conp,conpBak ,conpChange , cpld, cpldBak,cpldChange,boot , bootBak,bootChange,pcb , pcbBak, pcbChange, executeTime,datastate ,createTime,createBy , contractNo, itemCode, conpType, conpSeries, conpMark, customInfo) VALUES
(#softversionList[].id#, #softversionList[].projectId#,#{logId}, #softversionList[].barCode#, #softversionList[].conp#, #softversionList[].conpBak#,#softversionList[].conpChange#, #softversionList[].cpld# , #softversionList[].cpldBak# , #softversionList[].cpldChange# , #softversionList[].boot#, #softversionList[].bootBak#,#softversionList[].bootChange# , #softversionList[].pcb#,#softversionList[].pcbBak#, #softversionList[].pcbChange# <if test=" prepend="," property="softversionList[].executeTime"> #softversionList[].executeTime#
<if test=" prepend="," property="softversionList[].executeTime"> now()
<if test=" prepend="," property="softversionList[].datastate"> #softversionList[].datastate#
<if test=" prepend="," property="softversionList[].datastate"> 1
, now(), #{createBy} , #softversionList[].contractNo#, #softversionList[].itemCode#, #softversionList[].conpType#, #softversionList[].conpSeries#, #softversionList[].conpMark#, #softversionList[].customInfo# )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE contractNo = VALUES(contractNo), itemCode = VALUES(itemCode), datastate = VALUES(datastate), conpType = VALUES(conpType), conpSeries = VALUES(conpSeries), conpMark = VALUES(conpMark), customInfo = VALUES(customInfo)

mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project_soft_change_logs SET latest = 0 , updateTime = now(),updateBy = #{updateBy} WHERE projectId = #{projectId} AND latest = 1
mapper.select: SELECT id, CONCAT( changeVersion,'(' ,DATE_FORMAT(createTime,'%Y-%m-%d'),')' )AS `version` FROM pm_project_soft_change_logs WHERE projectId = #{projectId} ORDER BY createTime DESC;
mapper.sql:
SELECT sv.id, sv.projectId, sv.logId <if test=" checkShipment compareValue="true"> , sv.contractNo, sv.itemCode, sv.datastate
<if test=" checkShipment compareValue="true"> , IFNULL(sv.contractNo, fc.contract_code) AS contractNo , TRIM(IFNULL(sv.itemCode, fsb.item)) AS itemCode , COUNT(fc.contract_code) > 0 AS datastate
, sv.barCode, sv.conp, sv.conpType, sv.conpSeries, sv.conpMark , sv.conpBak, sv.conpChange, sv.cpld, sv.cpldBak, sv.cpldChange , sv.boot, sv.bootBak, sv.bootChange, sv.pcb, sv.pcbBak , sv.pcbChange, sv.executeTime, sv.createTime, sv.createBy , sv.updateTime, sv.updateBy, sv.customInfo
, fi.itemname as itemModel , fi.describe_ as itemDesc
, ph.column001 as officeCode, fdp.departmentName as officeName , ph.column004 as marketCode, ph.column004 as marketName , ph.column005 as systemCode, ph.column005 as systemName , ph.column006 as expendCode, ph.column006 as expendName , ph.column007 as industryCode, ph.column007 as industryName
, MAX(sbr.`item2`) AS itemCode2, MAX(sbr.`sn2`) AS barCode2 FROM pm_project_soft_version sv LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON sv.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON pgr.`projectCode` = ph.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pc.contractNo, '-C', '') AND sv.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN fnd_department fdp ON ph.`column001` = fdp.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.item = sv.itemCode
<if test=" checkShipment compareValue="true"> LEFT JOIN fb_shipment_barcode fsb ON fsb.`barcode` = sv.barcode AND ( ISNULL(`fsb`.`rma_no`) OR (`fsb`.`rma_no` = '') OR (`fsb`.`rma_no` = 'null') ) LEFT JOIN fb_shipment fs ON fs.`packlist_id` = fsb.`pack_id` LEFT JOIN fb_contract fc ON fc.`contract_id` = fs.`con_id` AND fc.contract_code = pc.contractNo
<if test=" prepend="and" projectId> ph.projectId = #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="and" logId> sv.logId = #{logId} <if test=" prepend="and" contractNo> sv.contractNo = #{contractNo} <if test=" prepend="and" itemCode> sv.itemCode = #{itemCode} <if test=" prepend="and" barCode> sv.barCode like concat(#{barCode}, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" datastate> sv.datastate = #{datastate}
<if test=" prepend="and" itemModel> fi.itemname like concat(#{itemModel}, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" projectName> ph.projectName like concat('%', #{projectName}, '%')
<if test=" prepend="and" officeCode> ph.column001 = #{officeCode} <if test=" prepend="and" marketCode> ph.column004 = #{marketCode} <if test=" prepend="and" systemCode> ph.column005 = #{systemCode} <if test=" prepend="and" expendCode> ph.column006 = #{expendCode} <if test=" prepend="and" industryCode> ph.column007 = #{industryCode}
<if test=" prepend="AND" checkHasConp compareValue="true"> sv.conp > '' <if test=" prepend="AND" checkNullConpMark compareValue="true"> sv.conpType IS NULL AND sv.conpSeries IS null AND sv.conpMark IS NULL
GROUP BY sv.`id` <if test=" updateInvalidShipment compareValue="true"> HAVING datastate = 0

) sv

SELECT sv.*, MAX(sbr.`item2`) AS itemCode2, MAX(sbr.`sn2`) AS barCode2 FROM pm_project_soft_version sv LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON sv.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON pgr.`projectCode` = ph.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pc.contractNo, '-C', '') AND sv.barcode = sbr.sn1 WHERE sv.projectId = #{projectId} AND sv.logId = #{id} GROUP BY sv.`id` ORDER BY sv.conpChange DESC, sv.bootChange DESC, sv.cpldChange DESC, sv.pcbChange DESC

select distinct fbp.dataTypeCode dataTypeCode, fbp.basicDataId basicDataId, concat(fbp.dataTypeCode, '-', fbp.basicDataId) eventKey, fbp.column010 column010, fbp.column011 column011, fbd.basicDataName eventValue from fnd_basic_prjstate fbp left join fnd_basic_data fbd on fbd.dataTypeCode = fbp.dataTypeCode and fbd.basicDataId = fbp.basicDataId where fbp.column011 = #{column011} and fbd.effectiveFrom <= now() and (fbd.effectiveTo > now() or fbd.effectiveTo is null)
<if test=" prepend="and " column010>fbp.column010 = #{column010} <if test=" prepend="and " column010>fbp.column010 is null ORDER BY fbd.`sortId`

SELECT d.`basicDataName` as memberRoleName ,m.* ,CASE WHEN (m.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (m.effectiveTo IS NULL OR m.effectiveTo > NOW())) THEN 1 ELSE -1 END AS datastate FROM pm_project_member m LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data d ON m.`memberRole` = d.`basicDataId` AND d.`dataTypeCode` = '03' WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
mapper.insert:
insert into `pm_project_member`(`projectId`, `projectType`, `memberRole`,`memberCode`,`memberName`,`phoneNum`,`email`,`fromFlag`,`createTime`,`createBy`,`effectiveFrom`,`effectiveTo`) values(#{projectId} , #{projectType}, #{memberRole} ,#{memberCode} ,#{memberName} ,#{phoneNum} ,#{email} ,#{fromFlag} ,#{createTime} ,#{createBy} ,#{effectiveFrom} ,#{effectiveTo} )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
mapper.update: update pm_project_task set effectiveTo = NOW(), updateTime = NOW(), updateBy = #{updateBy} where projectId = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_task (projectId, contractNo, taskTypeCode, taskTypeId, eventPlanHappenDate, eventPlanHappenDateENG, eventActualFinishDate, createTime, createBy, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, visibleFlag) values (#{projectId}, #{contractNo}, #{taskTypeCode}, #{taskTypeId}, #{eventPlanHappenDate}, #{eventPlanHappenDateENG}, #{eventActualFinishDate}, NOW(), #{createBy}, NOW() , #{effectiveTo}, #{visibleFlag})
mapper.select: select ppt.taskId, ppt.contractNo, ppt.projectId, concat(ppt.taskTypeCode, '-', ppt.taskTypeId) eventKeyStr, fbd.basicDataName eventValue, ppt.eventPlanHappenDate eventPlanHappenDateStr, ppt.eventPlanHappenDateENG eventPlanHappenDateENGStr, ppt.eventActualFinishDate eventActualFinishDateStr, ppt.visibleFlag from pm_project_task ppt left join fnd_basic_data fbd on fbd.dataTypeCode = ppt.taskTypeCode and fbd.basicDataId = ppt.taskTypeId where ppt.projectId = #{projectId} and ppt.effectiveFrom <= NOW() and (ppt.effectiveTo > NOW() or ppt.effectiveTo is null) order by fbd.sortId asc
SELECT id FROM pm_project_shipment WHERE projectId = #{projectId} and barcode = #{barcode}
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project_shipment SET installAddress = #{installAddress} WHERE id IN ($shipmentIds$)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_project_shipment`(`projectId`,`barcode`,`itemCode`,`itemName`,`receiveName`,`emsNum`,`emsCompany`,`packdate`, `contractNo`,`installAddress`,`createTime`,`createBy`) SELECT DISTINCT #{projectId}, a.barcode,a.itemCode , a.itemName ,b.`receiveName` ,b.`emsNum`,b.`emsCompany`,b.`packdate`, b.`contract_code` , #{installAddress},NOW(),#{createBy} FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm a LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm b ON a.contract_code = b.`contract_code` AND a.packId = b.`packId` WHERE a.contract_code in ($contractNo$) AND a.barcode IN ($codes$)
<if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> #{profitCenter}
