delete pps from pm_project_shipment pps <if test=" list>
SELECT #list[].contractNo# AS contractNo, #list[].barCode# AS barCode
<if test=" list> 1 = 0 <if test=" list> t.barCode IS NOT NULL
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, vsep.receiveName receiveName, vsep.emsNum emsNum, vsep.packdate packdate, vsep.emsCompany emsCompany,NULL AS installAddress, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 itemCode2, vsip.itemName2 itemName2 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code IN($contractNo$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode AND contractNo IN($contractNo$) and projectId = #{projectId} ) <if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> vsip.profitCenter = #{profitCenter} UNION ALL SELECT pps.`contractNo`,pps.`barcode`,pps.`itemCode`,pps.`itemName`,pps.`receiveName`,pps.`emsNum`,pps.`packdate`,pps.`emsCompany`,pps.`installAddress`, sbr.sn2 AS barCode2, sbr.item2 AS itemCode2, fi.describe_ AS itemName2 FROM pm_project_shipment pps LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pps.contractNo, '-C', '') AND pps.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON fi.item = sbr.item2 WHERE contractNo IN($contractNo$) and projectId = #{projectId} AND transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE FIND_IN_SET(vsip.contract_code ,REPLACE(REPLACE(#{contractNo}, '-C', ''), "'",'')) AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode)) ttt WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE ttt.barCode = pps1.barcode and pps1.contractNo IN($chContractNo$) and pps1.projectId = #{chProjectId} )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_project_shipment`(`projectId`,`barcode`,`itemCode`,`itemName`,`receiveName`,`emsNum`,`emsCompany`,`packdate`, `contractNo`, chProjectId, chContractNo, transferProjectId, transferContractNo, transferFlag, `createTime`,`createBy`) SELECT #{projectId}, a.barcode, a.itemCode, a.itemName, b.`receiveName`, b.`emsNum`, b.`emsCompany`, b.`packdate`,
<if test=" transferFlag compareValue="0">
CONCAT(#{chContractNo}, "-C"),
<if test=" transferFlag compareValue="1">
#{chContractNo},
#{chProjectId}, #{chContractNo}, #{transferProjectId}, #{transferContractNo}, #{transferFlag}, NOW(), #{createBy} FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm a LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm b ON a.contract_code = b.`contract_code` AND a.packId = b.`packId` WHERE b.contract_code = REPLACE(#{chContractNo}, "-C", "") AND a.barcode IN ($codes$)
<if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> #{profitCenter}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) AS COUNT FROM pm_basic_prj_deliver pbpd LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pbdd ON pbpd.`id` = pbdd.`deliverId` AND pbdd.`projectId` = #{projectId} AND pbdd.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( pbdd.effectiveTo > NOW() OR pbdd.effectiveTo IS NULL ) LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON pbpd.dataTypeCodeSon = fbd.dataTypeCode AND pbpd.basicDataIdSon = fbd.basicDataId WHERE pbpd.column011 = #{column011} AND pbpd.dataTypeCode = #{dataTypeCode} AND pbpd.effectiveTo IS NULL AND pbpd.`isNeed` = 1 AND pbdd.id IS NULL
<if test=" prepend="and " column010> pbpd.column010 = #{column010} <if test=" prepend="and " column010> pbpd.column010 is null

SELECT pbpd.id, CONCAT(pbpd.dataTypeCodeSon, '-', pbpd.basicDataIdSon) deliverKey, fbd.basicDataName deliverValue, pbpd.isNeed , CONCAT(pbpd.dataTypeCode, '-', pbpd.basicDataId) eventKey FROM `pm_basic_prj_deliver` pbpd LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON pbpd.dataTypeCodeSon = fbd.dataTypeCode AND pbpd.basicDataIdSon = fbd.basicDataId WHERE pbpd.column011 = #{column011} AND pbpd.dataTypeCode = #{dataTypeCode} AND pbpd.`isNeed` = 1 AND pbpd.effectiveTo IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` ppd WHERE ppd.`deliverId` = pbpd.`id` AND ppd.`projectId` = #{projectId} AND ppd.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND ( ppd.effectiveTo > NOW() OR ppd.effectiveTo IS NULL ) )
<if test=" prepend="and " column010> pbpd.column010 = #{column010} <if test=" prepend="and " column010> pbpd.column010 is null

SELECT pbdd.id, pbdd.`projectId`, pbdd.`deliverableName`, pbdd.`deliverablePath`, fbd.`basicDataName` as deliverableType FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pbdd INNER JOIN `pm_basic_prj_deliver` pbpd ON pbpd.id = pbdd.`deliverId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON fbd.`dataTypeCode` = pbpd.`dataTypeCodeSon` AND fbd.`basicDataId` = pbpd.`basicDataIdSon` WHERE pbdd.projectId = #{projectId} AND pbdd.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND (pbdd.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR pbdd.`effectiveTo` IS NULL) order by pbdd.uploadTime desc

SELECT pbdd.id, pbdd.`projectId`, pbdd.`deliverableName`, pbdd.`deliverablePath`, fbd.`basicDataName` as deliverableType, CONCAT(pbpd.dataTypeCode, "-", pbpd.basicDataId) AS eventKey, IFNULL(Concat(pbdd.uploadUser, "-", ui.realName), pbdd.uploadUser) as uploadUser, pbdd.uploadTime FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pbdd INNER JOIN `pm_basic_prj_deliver` pbpd ON pbpd.id = pbdd.`deliverId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON fbd.`dataTypeCode` = pbpd.`dataTypeCodeSon` AND fbd.`basicDataId` = pbpd.`basicDataIdSon` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.username = pbdd.uploadUser WHERE pbdd.projectId = #{projectId} AND pbpd.dataTypeCode = #{dataTypeCode} AND pbdd.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND (pbdd.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR pbdd.`effectiveTo` IS NULL) order by pbdd.uploadTime desc

SELECT pbdd.id, pbdd.`projectId`, pbdd.`deliverableName`, pbdd.`deliverablePath`, fbd.`basicDataName` as deliverableType, CONCAT(pbpd.dataTypeCode, "-", pbpd.basicDataId) AS eventKey, IFNULL(Concat(pbdd.uploadUser, "-", ui.realName), pbdd.uploadUser) as uploadUser, pbdd.uploadTime FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` pbdd INNER JOIN `pm_basic_prj_deliver` pbpd ON pbpd.id = pbdd.`deliverId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON fbd.`dataTypeCode` = pbpd.`dataTypeCodeSon` AND fbd.`basicDataId` = pbpd.`basicDataIdSon` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.username = pbdd.uploadUser WHERE pbdd.projectId = #{projectId} AND pbdd.projectType = #{projectType} AND pbdd.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND (pbdd.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR pbdd.`effectiveTo` IS NULL) order by pbdd.uploadTime desc
mapper.update: update pm_basic_deliver_detail set effectiveTo = NOW() where id = #{deliverid}
update pm_project_log set handleEndTime = now() , handleState = #{handleState} where id = #{handleId}
mapper.select: select salesManCode,salesmanTel,salesManName , CASE WHEN (POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail) >0 AND POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail)>0) THEN ( CASE WHEN POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail) > POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail) THEN LEFT(salesmanMail,POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail)+2) ELSE RIGHT(salesmanMail,(LENGTH(salesmanMail)-(POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail)+2))) END) WHEN (POSITION('com' IN salesmanMail) >0 AND POSITION('net' IN salesmanMail) = 0) THEN salesmanMail ELSE salesmanMail END AS salesmanMail from pm_person_from_oa where salesmanCode = #{code}
SELECT MAX(weeklyId) FROM pm_project_weekly WHERE weeklyState = 1 AND projectId = #{projectId};

SELECT pbpd.column010 column010, pbpd.column011 column011, pbpd.dataTypeCode dataTypeCode, pbpd.basicDataId basicDataId, pbdd.projectId projectId, pbdd.projectType, pbdd.taskId, pbdd.deliverId FROM pm_basic_prj_deliver pbpd LEFT JOIN pm_basic_deliver_detail pbdd ON pbdd.deliverId = pbpd.id WHERE pbdd.id = #{id} limit 1
SELECT pbpd.column010 column010, pbpd.column011 column011, pbpd.dataTypeCode dataTypeCode, pbpd.basicDataId basicDataId, 0 as projectId FROM pm_basic_prj_deliver pbpd WHERE pbpd.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_project_notification_state`(`notifyId`,`notifyObject`,`notifyState`,`createTime`,`createBy`) values
(#{notifyId} ,#objs[]#,0,now(),#{createBy})
mapper.select: SELECT email FROM `fnd_user_info` WHERE username = #{username} and effectiveTo is null
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( email SEPARATOR ';') AS mails FROM `fnd_user_info` WHERE roleIds LIKE CONCAT('%;', #{roleId}, ';%') AND isemail = 1 AND status = 1;
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( username) AS mails FROM `fnd_user_info` WHERE roleIds LIKE CONCAT('%;', #{roleId}, ';%') ;

SELECT DISTINCT a.`contractNo` , IFNULL(IF(a.salesType = '01', a.`projectName`, b.projectName), a.projectName) as projectName ,a.`customerName` ,a.`orderCreateTime` , b.`marketName` , b.`salesManName` FROM `pm_order_data_from_sap` a LEFT JOIN pm_project_property_from_sms b ON a.`orderExecNumber` = b.`orderExecNumber` WHERE contractNo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{mergeContractNo}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `pm_project_contract`(contractNo ,projectGroupCode,createTime ,createBy) SELECT #{contractNo} ,a.projectGroupCode ,NOW() ,#{createBy} FROM pm_project_group_relationship a LEFT JOIN pm_project_header b ON a.`projectCode` = b.`projectCode` WHERE projectId= #{projectId} LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO `pm_project_product_line`(`projectId`,`contractNo`,`itemCode`,`itemName`,`orderQuantity`,`deliverQuantity`,`openQuantity`, orderNumber, lineNum) SELECT #{projectId} , #{contractNo} ,a.itemCode ,a.`itemDesc` ,a.`orderQuantity`, ( a.`orderQuantity` - a.`openQuantity` ) AS deliverQuantity , a.`openQuantity`, a.orderNumber, a.lineNum FROM `pm_order_line_from_sap` a LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` b ON a.`orderNumber` = b.`orderNumber` AND a.lineType = b.orderType AND a.`compCode` = b.`compCode` WHERE b.contractNo = #{contractNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE pl FROM pm_project_product_line pl WHERE pl.projectId = #{projectId} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `pm_project_header` ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` WHERE pl.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND pl.contractNo = pc.`contractNo` AND ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pm_project WHERE projectCode LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectCode}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `pm_project_group_relationship`(projectGroupCode,`projectCode`,`smsProjectCode`,mergeBranchMark,`createTime`,`createBy`) SELECT projectGroupCode , #{newProjectCode} , smsProjectCode , #{mergeBranchMark} , NOW() ,#{createBy} FROM pm_project_group_relationship WHERE projectCode = #{projectCode} LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO `pm_project_header`(`projectCode`,`projectName`,`projectState`,`column001`,`column002`,`column003`, `column004`,`column005`,`column006`,`column007`,`column008`,`column009`,`column010`,`column011`,`column012` ,`column013`, compId, `createTime`,`createBy`,`effectiveFrom`) SELECT #{newProjectCode},`projectName`,#{projectState},`column001`,`column002`,`column003`, `column004`,`column005`,`column006`,`column007`,`column008`,`column009`,`column010`,`column011`,`column012` ,`column013`, compId, NOW(),#{createBy} ,NOW() FROM `pm_project_header` WHERE projectId = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
SELECT last_insert_id() as id
mapper.update: UPDATE `pm_project_product_line` SET projectQuantity = #{projectQuantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `pm_project_product_line`(`projectId`,`contractNo`,`itemCode`,`itemName`,`projectQuantity`,`orderQuantity`, `deliverQuantity`,`openQuantity`) VALUES
(#{newProjectId} ,#productList[].contractNo# ,#productList[].itemCode# ,#productList[].itemName# ,#productList[].branchQuantity# ,#productList[].orderQuantity# ,#productList[].deliverQuantity# ,#productList[].openQuantity# )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_task WHERE projectId = #{projectId} AND effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (effectiveTo IS NULL OR effectiveTo > NOW())
SELECT DISTINCT systemName ,systemName FROM pm_project_property_from_sms
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `pm_project_task`(`projectId`, projectType, `contractNo`,`taskTypeCode`,`taskTypeId`,`eventPlanHappenDate`,`eventPlanHappenDateENG`,`eventActualFinishDate`, `createTime`,`createBy`,`effectiveFrom`) SELECT ppt.`projectId`, ppt.projectType, #{contractNo} ,ppt.`taskTypeCode` ,ppt.`taskTypeId` ,null ,ppt.`eventPlanHappenDateENG` , ppt.`eventActualFinishDate` ,now(),#{createBy},now() FROM pm_project_task ppt WHERE contractNo = (SELECT contractNo FROM pm_project_task WHERE projectId = #{projectId} AND effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (effectiveTo IS NULL OR effectiveTo > NOW()) LIMIT 1);
mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(a.`email`) FROM pm_project_member a WHERE a.`memberRole` IN ('10', '40', '70', '71') AND a.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND ( a.`effectiveTo` IS NULL OR a.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) AND a.`projectId` = #{projectId}

select count(1) from pm_project_contract t1 JOIN pm_project_group_relationship t2 ON t1.`projectGroupCode` = t2.`projectGroupCode` JOIN pm_project_header t3 ON t2.`projectCode` = t3.`projectCode` AND t3.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND (t3.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR t3.`effectiveTo` IS NULL) where contractNo in ($contractNo$)

select count(1) from pm_project_contract t1 JOIN pm_project_group_relationship t2 ON t1.`projectGroupCode` = t2.`projectGroupCode` JOIN pm_project t3 ON t2.`projectCode` = t3.`projectCode` AND t3.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND (t3.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR t3.`effectiveTo` IS NULL) where contractNo in ($contractNo$)
<if test=" prepend="and" projectType> t3.projectType = #{projectType}
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project SET effectiveTo = NOW(),updateTime = now() WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
UPDATE pm_project_notification_state a , pm_project_notification b SET a.`notifyState` = 1 WHERE a.`notifyId` = b.`id` AND b.`projectId` = #{projectId}
mapper.select:
select a.id as id,a.projectName as projectName,a.projectCode as projectCode,a.evaluationResult as evaResult,a.times as times,a.projectId as projectId, case when a.updatedTime is null then a.createdTime else a.updatedTime end as cbTime , b.quesMarkScore as totalScore, b.quesMarkResult as cbResult, e1.questionAnswer as equExplain, e2.questionAnswer as opinion, a.evaluationComment as approveRemark,
c.questionScore10 AS projectScore, c.questionScore20 AS equScore, c.questionScore30 AS engScore, c.questionScore40 AS otherScore, t2.departmentName as officeName, t3.memberName as pmRealName,
CASE WHEN t1.column012 IS NULL AND t1.columno12_readonly = - 1 THEN t1.column012 WHEN t1.column012 IS NOT NULL THEN t1.column012 ELSE t1.columno12_readonly END AS serviceType, t1.compId, fc.name AS companyName, fc.abbr AS companyAbbr , CONCAT('{"productHarmfulSubstanceControl":"', er3.questionOptionsContent, '"', '}') AS `customInfo` from ( select aa.*, a.times from (SELECT MAX(aa.id) AS id, COUNT(aa.id) AS times FROM pm_cl_evaluation_header aa WHERE aa.evaluationType = 3 AND aa.status = 1 GROUP BY aa.projectCode) a left join pm_cl_evaluation_header aa on aa.id = a.id ) a left join pm_cl_quesnaire_result_header b on a.id=b.evaluationHeaderId and b.status=1
LEFT JOIN (SELECT quesnaireTemplateHeaderId,quesnaireResultHeaderId,quesTypeForCB,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=10, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore10,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=20, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore20,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=30, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore30,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=40, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore40 FROM pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line c1 WHERE quesTypeForCB IN (10,20,30,40) GROUP BY quesnaireResultHeaderId) c ON b.id=c.quesnaireResultHeaderId
left join pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line d1 on b.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId=d1.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId and d1.questionNum=5 left join pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line e1 on e1.quesnaireResultHeaderId=b.id and e1.quesnaireTemplateLineId=d1.id left join pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line d2 on b.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId=d2.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId and d2.questionNum=8 left join pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line e2 on e2.quesnaireResultHeaderId=b.id and e2.quesnaireTemplateLineId=d2.id LEFT JOIN pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line d3 ON b.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId=d3.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId AND d3.questionNum=9 LEFT JOIN pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line e3 ON e3.quesnaireResultHeaderId=b.id AND e3.quesnaireTemplateLineId=d3.id LEFT JOIN pm_cl_quesnaire_template_options er3 ON er3.questionId = d3.id AND er3.id = e3.questionTemplateOptId LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t1 ON a.projectId = t1.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_department t2 ON t1.column001 = t2.departmentNum LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t3 ON t1.projectId = t3.projectId AND t3.memberRole = '30' AND t3.effectiveTo IS NULL LEFT JOIN `fnd_company` fc ON t1.compId = fc.id
where t1.projectState != 20
<if test=" prepend="and" cbStartTime>
DATE_FORMAT(a.createdTime,'%Y-%m-%d')>=DATE_FORMAT(#{cbStartTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
<if test=" prepend="and" cbEndTime>
DATE_FORMAT(a.createdTime,'%Y-%m-%d')<=DATE_FORMAT(#{cbEndTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
<if test=" prepend="and" serviceType> (t1.column012 = #{serviceType} or t1.columno12_readonly= #{serviceType}) <if test=" prepend="and" officeCode> t1.column001 = #{officeCode} <if test=" prepend="and" officeCodes> FIND_IN_SET(t1.column001, #{officeCodes}) <if test=" prepend="and" compId> t1.compId = #{compId}
group by a.projectCode
UNION select a.quesnaireId as id,t1.projectName as projectName,t1.projectCode as projectCode,b.quesMarkResult as evaResult,a.times as times,a.projectId as projectId, case when a.updateTime is null then a.createTime else a.updateTime end as cbTime , b.quesMarkScore as totalScore, b.quesMarkResult as cbResult, e1.questionAnswer as equExplain, e2.questionAnswer as opinion, ahc.message as approveMessage,
c.questionScore10 AS projectScore, c.questionScore20 AS equScore, c.questionScore30 AS engScore, c.questionScore40 AS otherScore, t2.departmentName as officeName, t3.memberName as pmRealName,
CASE WHEN t1.column012 IS NULL AND t1.columno12_readonly = - 1 THEN t1.column012 WHEN t1.column012 IS NOT NULL THEN t1.column012 ELSE t1.columno12_readonly END AS serviceType, t1.compId, fc.name AS companyName, fc.abbr AS companyAbbr , CONCAT('{"productHarmfulSubstanceControl":"', er3.questionOptionsContent, '"', '}') AS `customInfo` from ( SELECT cb.projectId,cb.applyState, cb.instId, cbq.*, cbq.quesnaireVersion as times FROM pm_cl_callback cb LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM pm_cl_callback_quesnaire WHERE quesnaireState = 1 AND id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM `pm_cl_callback_quesnaire` GROUP BY callBackId)) cbq ON cb.id = cbq.callBackId AND cbq.quesnaireState = 1 where cb.applyState != -1 and cbq.quesnaireId IS NOT NULL AND cb.projectId NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM `pm_cl_evaluation_header`) ORDER BY cbq.createTime desc ) a INNER JOIN ( SELECT cb.projectId, MAX(cbq.createTime) createTime FROM pm_cl_callback cb LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM pm_cl_callback_quesnaire WHERE quesnaireState = 1 AND id IN (SELECT MAX(id) FROM `pm_cl_callback_quesnaire` GROUP BY callBackId)) cbq ON cb.id = cbq.callBackId AND cbq.quesnaireState = 1 WHERE cb.applyState != -1 AND cbq.quesnaireId IS NOT NULL AND cb.projectId NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM `pm_cl_evaluation_header`) GROUP BY cb.`projectId` ) ma ON ma.createTime = a.createTime AND ma.projectId = a.projectId left join (select ach.* from (select max(id) as maxId from `fnd_act_hi_comment` ahc left join `act_hi_taskinst` aht on ahc.taskId = aht.ID_ where procdefKey = 'CallBack' and aht.TASK_DEF_KEY_ = 'usertask2' group by objId, procdefKey, instId) t left join fnd_act_hi_comment ach on ach.id = t.maxId) ahc on a.instId = ahc.instId left join pm_cl_quesnaire_result_header b on a.quesnaireId=b.id and b.status=1
LEFT JOIN (SELECT quesnaireTemplateHeaderId,quesnaireResultHeaderId,quesTypeForCB,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=10, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore10,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=20, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore20,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=30, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore30,SUM(IF(c1.quesTypeForCB=40, questionScore, NULL)) AS questionScore40 FROM pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line c1 WHERE quesTypeForCB IN (10,20,30,40) GROUP BY quesnaireResultHeaderId) c ON b.id=c.quesnaireResultHeaderId
left join pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line d1 on b.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId=d1.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId and d1.questionNum=5 left join pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line e1 on e1.quesnaireResultHeaderId=b.id and e1.quesnaireTemplateLineId=d1.id left join pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line d2 on b.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId=d2.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId and d2.questionNum=8 left join pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line e2 on e2.quesnaireResultHeaderId=b.id and e2.quesnaireTemplateLineId=d2.id LEFT JOIN pm_cl_quesnaire_template_line d3 ON b.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId=d3.quesnaireTemplateHeaderId AND d3.questionNum=9 LEFT JOIN pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line e3 ON e3.quesnaireResultHeaderId=b.id AND e3.quesnaireTemplateLineId=d3.id LEFT JOIN pm_cl_quesnaire_template_options er3 ON er3.questionId = d3.id AND er3.id = e3.questionTemplateOptId LEFT JOIN pm_project_header t1 ON a.projectId = t1.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_department t2 ON t1.column001 = t2.departmentNum LEFT JOIN pm_project_member t3 ON t1.projectId = t3.projectId AND t3.memberRole = '30' AND t3.effectiveTo IS null LEFT JOIN `fnd_company` fc ON t1.compId = fc.id WHERE t1.projectState != 20 <if test=" prepend="and" cbStartTime>
DATE_FORMAT(a.createTime,'%Y-%m-%d')>=DATE_FORMAT(#{cbStartTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
<if test=" prepend="and" cbEndTime>
DATE_FORMAT(a.createTime,'%Y-%m-%d')<=DATE_FORMAT(#{cbEndTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
<if test=" prepend="and" serviceType> (t1.column012 = #{serviceType} or t1.columno12_readonly= #{serviceType}) <if test=" prepend="and" officeCode> t1.column001 = #{officeCode} <if test=" prepend="and" officeCodes> FIND_IN_SET(t1.column001, #{officeCodes}) <if test=" prepend="and" compId> t1.compId = #{compId}
group by t1.projectCode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `pm_project_shipment` pps WHERE projectId = #{projectId} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip WHERE vsip.contract_code = replace(pps.contractNo, "-C", "") AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `pm_project_shipment` pps WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_project_state WHERE projectId = #{projectId};
mapper.insert: insert into pm_project_state( projectId <if test=" prepend="," projectPlanState> projectPlanState , projectplanTime <if test=" prepend="," shipmentState> shipmentState , shipmentTime <if test=" prepend="," executionState> executionState , executionStateTime <if test=" prepend="," closeProcessState> closeProcessState , closeProcessStateTime ) values( #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="," projectPlanState> #{projectPlanState} , now() <if test=" prepend="," shipmentState> #{shipmentState} , now() <if test=" prepend="," executionState> #{executionState} , now() <if test=" prepend="," closeProcessState> #{closeProcessState} , now() )
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(openQuantity) = 0 THEN -1 WHEN SUM(openQuantity) = SUM(orderQuantity) THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS deliverstate FROM pm_project_product_line WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
SELECT projectPlanState FROM pm_project_state WHERE projectId = #{projectId}

SELECT t3.basicDataId FROM (SELECT t1.`taskTypeId` AS taskTypeId, t1.taskTypeCode, t1.projectId FROM pm_project_task t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT t1.`taskTypeId` AS taskTypeId, projectId, taskId FROM pm_project_task t1 WHERE t1.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ISNULL( t1.`effectiveTo` OR (t1.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) ) AND FALSE = ISNULL(t1.`eventActualFinishDate`) AND t1.projectId = #{projectId} ORDER BY taskId DESC LIMIT 1) t ON t1.projectId = t.projectId WHERE t1.`effectiveFrom` < NOW() AND ISNULL( t1.`effectiveTo` OR (t1.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) ) AND ISNULL(t1.`eventActualFinishDate`) AND t1.projectId = #{projectId} AND t1.`taskId` >= IFNULL(t.`taskId`, 0) ORDER BY t1.taskId ASC LIMIT 1) t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON t1.`taskTypeCode` = t2.`dataTypeCode` AND t1.`taskTypeId` = t2.`basicDataId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t2.`basicDataName` = t3.`basicDataName` AND t3.`dataTypeCode` = '22'
mapper.update: UPDATE pm_project_header t1 , pm_cl_evaluation_header t2 SET t1.projectCloseTime = NOW() WHERE t1.projectId = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`id` = #{closeId}
UPDATE pm_project SET projectCloseTime = NOW() WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
UPDATE pm_project SET projectCloseTime = null WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
UPDATE pm_project SET projectRefreshTime = NOW() WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
UPDATE pm_project_state t1, pm_cl_evaluation_header t2 SET t1.projectPlanState = 48 , t1.projectplanTime = NOW() WHERE t1.projectId = t2.`projectId` AND t2.`id` = #{closeId}
mapper.select: SELECT deliverId FROM pm_basic_deliver_detail WHERE id = #{deliverid}
SELECT projectId FROM pm_cl_evaluation_header WHERE id = #{closeId}

SELECT CONCAT( t1.`applyBy`,'-' ,t4.`realName`) AS applyByName , CASE WHEN t3.`realName` IS NULL THEN '回访人员' ELSE CONCAT(t3.username,'-' , t3.realName) END AS ASSIGNEE_Name, t2.`ASSIGNEE_`, t5.basicDataName AS applyStateName , t1.applyTime , t2.id_ AS taskId , t1.projectId ,t1.instId,t1.applyState ,t1.id AS callbackId ,t1.applyBy FROM pm_cl_callback t1 LEFT JOIN act_ru_task t2 ON t1.`instId` = t2.`PROC_INST_ID_` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t3 ON t2.`ASSIGNEE_` = t3.`username` AND t3.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t4 ON t1.`applyBy` = t4.`username` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t5 ON t5.basicDataId = t1.applyState AND t5.dataTypeCode = '25' AND t5.effectiveTo IS NULL WHERE t1.`projectId` = #{projectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_cl_callback WHERE applyState = 1 AND projectId = #{projectId} AND effectiveTo IS NULL;

SELECT CONCAT( t1.`applyBy`,'-' ,t4.`realName`) AS applyByName , CASE WHEN t3.`realName` IS NULL THEN '回访人员' ELSE CONCAT(t3.username,'-' , t3.realName) END AS ASSIGNEE_Name, t2.`ASSIGNEE_`, t5.basicDataName AS applyStateName , t1.applyTime , t2.id_ AS taskId , t1.projectId ,t1.instId,t1.applyState ,t1.id AS callbackId ,t1.applyBy FROM pm_cl_callback t1 LEFT JOIN act_ru_task t2 ON t1.`instId` = t2.`PROC_INST_ID_` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t3 ON t2.`ASSIGNEE_` = t3.`username` AND t3.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t4 ON t1.`applyBy` = t4.`username` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t5 ON t5.basicDataId = t1.applyState AND t5.dataTypeCode = '25' AND t5.effectiveTo IS NULL
<if test=" applyState prepend="and"> t1.applyState = #{applyState} <if test=" projectId prepend="and"> t1.projectId = #{projectId}

SELECT `ph`.`projectId` AS `projectId`, `ph`.`projectCode` AS `projectCode`, `ph`.`projectState` AS `projectState`, `ph`.`column001` AS `officeCode`, `pm1`.`memberCode` AS `serviceManagerCode`, `pm1`.`memberName` AS `serviceManagerCodeforjson`, `pm2`.`memberCode` AS `programManagerCode`, `pm2`.`memberName` AS `programManagerCodeforjson`, `pm3`.`memberCode` AS `programManagerCodeB`, `pm3`.`memberName` AS `programManagerCodeforjsonB` FROM `pm_project_header` ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` pm1 ON `ph`.`projectId` = `pm1`.`projectId` AND (`pm1`.`memberRole` = '20') AND (`pm1`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`pm1`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`pm1`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` pm2 ON ( `ph`.`projectId` = `pm2`.`projectId` ) AND (`pm2`.`memberRole` = '30') AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 1 AND (`pm2`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`pm2`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`pm2`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_member` pm3 ON ( `ph`.`projectId` = `pm3`.`projectId` ) AND (`pm3`.`memberRole` = '30') AND pm3.`fromFlag` = 2 AND (`pm3`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`pm3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`pm3`.`effectiveTo`) ) where ISNULL(`ph`.`effectiveTo`)
<if test=" prepend="and" projectState> FIND_IN_SET(ph.projectState, #{projectState} ) <if test=" prepend="and" column001> ph.column001 = #{column001} <if test=" prepend="and" serviceManagerCode> pm1.`memberCode` = #{serviceManagerCode} <if test=" prepend="and" programManagerCode> (pm2.`memberCode` = #{programManagerCode} or pm3.`memberCode` = #{programManagerCode})
SELECT UpdateServiceAndProgramMember(#{vMemberCode}, #{vNewMemberCode}, #{vNewMemberName}, #{vDepartmentName}, #{operateUser},#{changeType}) result;
select * from pm_project_product_line_real where projectId = #{projectId}
select count(*) from pm_project_product_line_real where projectId = #{projectId}

SELECT c.* , SUBSTRING_INDEX(bomPaths, ',', level -1) AS parentBomPaths , concat(c.itemGroup, "_", SUBSTRING_INDEX(bomPaths, ',', level -1)) parentGroupPaths , concat(c.itemGroup, "_", bomPaths) groupPaths FROM pm_project_product_config_level_info_from_crm c INNER JOIN ( SELECT projectCode, MAX(orderExecNumber) AS max_order FROM pm_project_product_config_level_info_from_crm c WHERE c.projectCode = #{projectCode} GROUP BY projectCode ) m ON c.projectCode = m.projectCode AND c.orderExecNumber = m.max_order WHERE c.projectCode = #{projectCode} ORDER BY c.projectCode, itemGroup, bomPaths;

SELECT pt.*, ph.`projectName`, fbd.`basicDataName` AS eventKeyStr, DATEDIFF(eventPlanHappenDate, CURDATE()) AS eventValueStr FROM `pm_project_task` pt LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON pt.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` fbd ON pt.`taskTypeCode` = fbd.`dataTypeCode` AND pt.`taskTypeId` = fbd.`basicDataId` WHERE DATEDIFF(eventPlanHappenDate, CURDATE()) BETWEEN 25 AND 31 AND pt.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND (taskTypeId = 60 OR taskTypeId = 70) AND eventActualFinishDate IS NULL AND eventPlanHappenDate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pt.projectId, pt.taskTypeId

SELECT *, DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), t.packdate) AS eventValueStr FROM (SELECT ph.`projectId`, pc.`contractNo`, ph.`projectName`, MAX(fs.`packdate`) packdate, CASE WHEN pt.eventPlanHappenDate IS NULL THEN DATE_ADD(MAX(fs.`packdate`), INTERVAL (SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(var, ';', -1) FROM `fnd_sys_arg` WHERE CODE = 'arrivalReceipt.mailTimes') DAY) ELSE pt.eventPlanHappenDate END AS eventPlanHappenDate, "到货验收" AS eventKeyStr FROM pm_project_header ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_state` ps ON ps.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_task pt ON ph.`projectId` = pt.`projectId` AND pt.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_group pg ON pg.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_contract pc ON pg.`projectGroupCode` = pc.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN fb_contract fc ON fc.`contract_code` = pc.`contractNo` LEFT JOIN fb_shipment fs ON fc.`contract_id` = fs.`con_id` WHERE ps.`shipmentState` = - 1 AND ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), fs.`packdate`) <= (SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTR(var, 1, LOCATE(';', var) - 1), ',', -1) FROM `fnd_sys_arg` WHERE CODE = 'arrivalReceipt.mailTimes') AND ( ( pt.taskTypeId = 30 AND pt.eventActualFinishDate IS NULL ) OR pt.`taskTypeId` IS NULL ) AND ph.`column004` = "运营商市场部" AND ( ph.column011 = 10 OR ph.column011 IS NULL ) AND ph.`projectState` IN (30, 31, 32) GROUP BY ph.`projectId`, pc.`contractNo`) t WHERE FIND_IN_SET(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), t.packdate), (SELECT SUBSTR(var, 1, LOCATE(';', var) - 1) FROM `fnd_sys_arg` WHERE CODE = 'arrivalReceipt.mailTimes'))
select salesmanMail from `pm_person_from_oa` where salesManCode = substr(#{userName},2);
SELECT * FROM pm_project_member WHERE projectId = #{projectId} AND effectiveTo IS NULL
SELECT * FROM pm_project_member WHERE projectId = #{projectId} <if test=" prepend="and" memberRoles> FIND_IN_SET(memberRole, #{memberRoles}) AND effectiveTo IS NULL
mapper.delete: DELETE c, `g`, `gr`, `h`, `i`, `l`, `m`, `n`, ns, `pl`, `plr`, `prp`, `s`, `pscl`, `sv`, `ps`, `t`, `w`, `wc`, `wf`, pr, rp, ceh, qrh, qrl, cc, ccq, qrh2, qrl2 FROM pm_project_contract c LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship gr ON c.`projectGroupCode` = gr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_group g ON gr.`projectGroupCode` = g.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_header h ON h.`projectCode` = REPLACE(gr.`projectCode`, "-his", "") LEFT JOIN pm_project_instruction i ON h.`projectId` = i.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_log l ON h.`projectId` = l.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_member m ON h.`projectId` = m.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_notification n ON h.`projectId` = n.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_notification_state ns ON n.`id` = ns.`notifyId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_product_line pl ON h.`projectId` = pl.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_product_line_real plr ON h.`projectId` = plr.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_related_party prp ON h.`projectId` = prp.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_shipment s ON h.`projectId` = s.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_change_logs pscl ON h.`projectId` = pscl.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version sv ON h.`projectId` = sv.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_state ps ON h.`projectId` = ps.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_task t ON h.`projectId` = t.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_weekly w ON h.`projectId` = w.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_weekly_content wc ON w.`weeklyId` = wc.`weeklyId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_weekly_feedback wf ON w.`weeklyId` = wf.`weeklyId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_evaluation_header` ceh ON h.`projectId` = ceh.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_header` qrh ON ceh.`id` = qrh.`evaluationHeaderId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line` qrl ON qrh.`id` = qrl.`quesnaireResultHeaderId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_callback` cc ON h.`projectId` = cc.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_callback_quesnaire` ccq ON cc.`id` = ccq.`callBackId` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_header` qrh2 ON ccq.`quesnaireId` = qrh2.`id` LEFT JOIN `pm_cl_quesnaire_result_line` qrl2 ON qrh2.`id` = qrl2.`quesnaireResultHeaderId` LEFT JOIN `prob_restore` pr ON h.`projectId` = pr.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `prob_restore_process` rp ON pr.`processId` = rp.`id` WHERE c.`contractNo` in ($contractNo$)
mapper.select: SELECT h.* FROM `pm_project_contract` c LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` g ON c.`projectGroupCode` = g.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` gr ON g.`projectGroupCode` = gr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` h ON h.`projectCode` = REPLACE(gr.`projectCode`, "-his", "") WHERE c.`contractNo` in ($contractNo$) AND h.projectId IS NOT NULL

SELECT contractNo, itemCode, IF( itemName = IFNULL(itemName2, itemName), itemName, CONCAT(t.itemName, '\r\n(', itemName2, ')') ) AS itemName, t.qty, t.barCodes FROM (SELECT contractNo, IF(t.itemCode2 IS NULL, t.itemCode, CONCAT(t.itemCode, '\r\n(', itemCode2, ')')) AS itemCode, CASE WHEN fi.`itemname` IS NULL OR fi.itemname = '' OR fi.itemname = '/' THEN fi.describe_ ELSE fi.itemname END AS itemName, CASE WHEN fi2.`itemname` IS NULL OR fi2.itemname = '' OR fi2.itemname = '/' THEN fi2.describe_ ELSE fi2.itemname END AS itemName2, COUNT(1) AS qty, CASE WHEN igi.itemCode IS NULL THEN GROUP_CONCAT(IF(barCode2 IS NULL, barcode, CONCAT(barcode, '(', barCode2, ')')) ORDER BY barCode SEPARATOR '、') ELSE '' END AS barCodes FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, -1 AS transferFlag, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemcode2 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNo$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode and contractNo in ($contractNo$) and projectId = #{projectId} ) <if test=" prepend="and" profitCenter> vsip.profitCenter = #{profitCenter} UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT pps.`contractNo`, pps.`barcode`, pps.`itemCode`, pps.transferFlag, sbr.sn2 as barCode2, sbr.item2 FROM pm_project_shipment pps LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pps.contractNo, '-C', '') AND pps.barcode = sbr.sn1 WHERE contractNo in ($contractNo$) and projectId = #{projectId} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($sourceContractNo$)
AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode) ORDER BY transferFlag asc) t LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON fi.`item` = t.itemCode LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi2 ON fi2.`item` = t.itemCode2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_spot_check_ignore_item` igi ON igi.itemCode = t.itemCode WHERE t.transferFlag != 1 GROUP BY t.itemCode) t ORDER BY t.contractNo, barCodes DESC, t.itemCode ASC;
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_spot_check_ignore_item values
(#[].itemCode#, #[].itemModel#, #[].itemName#)
mapper.select:
SELECT CONCAT(t1.`createBy`, '-', t6.`realName`) AS createBy ,t1.* FROM pm_project_notification t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t6 ON t6.`username` = t1.`createBy`
WHERE t1.projectId = #{projectId} ORDER BY t1.`createTime` DESC

SELECT DISTINCT t.officeCode FROM (SELECT ph.`projectId`, ph.column001 AS officeCode, pc.`contractNo`, ph.`projectName`, planState.`basicDataName` AS planStateName, MAX(fs.`packdate`) packdate, MAX( IF ( pt.taskTypeId = 30, pt.eventActualFinishDate, NULL ) ) AS arrivalFinishDate, MAX( IF ( pt.taskTypeId = 60, pt.eventActualFinishDate, NULL ) ) AS preInspectFinishDate, MAX( IF ( pt.taskTypeId = 70, pt.eventActualFinishDate, NULL ) ) AS finalInspectFinishDate FROM pm_project_header ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_state` ps ON ps.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data planState ON planState.`dataTypeCode` = '22' AND planState.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND planState.`basicDataId` = ps.`projectPlanState` LEFT JOIN pm_project_task pt ON ph.`projectId` = pt.`projectId` AND pt.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_group pg ON pg.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_contract pc ON pg.`projectGroupCode` = pc.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN fb_contract fc ON fc.`contract_code` = pc.`contractNo` LEFT JOIN fb_shipment fs ON fc.`contract_id` = fs.`con_id` WHERE ps.`shipmentState` = - 1 AND pt.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ( ( FIND_IN_SET(pt.taskTypeId, "30,60,70") AND ph.`projectId` IN (SELECT DISTINCT projectId FROM pm_project_task pt WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pt.taskTypeId, "30,60,70") AND pt.eventActualFinishDate IS NULL) ) OR pt.`taskTypeId` IS NULL ) AND ph.`column004` = "运营商市场部" AND ( ph.column011 = 10 OR ph.column011 IS NULL ) AND ph.`projectState` IN (30, 31, 32) GROUP BY ph.`projectId`, pc.`contractNo`) t WHERE t.packdate IS NOT NULL

SELECT ph.`column001` AS officeCode, fd.`departmentName` AS officeName, ps.`projectPlanState`, planState.`basicDataName` AS planState, COUNT(*) as count FROM pm_project_header ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_state` ps ON ps.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data planState ON planState.`dataTypeCode` = '22' AND planState.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND planState.`basicDataId` = ps.`projectPlanState` LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.`departmentNum` = ph.column001 WHERE ph.`projectState` IN (30, 31, 32) AND ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND ph.`column004` = "运营商市场部" AND ( ph.column011 = 10 OR ph.column011 IS NULL ) GROUP BY officeCode, projectPlanState ORDER BY officeCode, projectPlanState

SELECT DISTINCT pm.`memberCode`, pm.`memberName`, pm.`memberRole`, IFNULL(pm.email, po.salesmanMail) AS email FROM `pm_project_member` pm LEFT JOIN `pm_person_from_oa` po ON po.`salesmanCode` = SUBSTR(pm.`memberCode`, - 5) WHERE pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL <if test=" prepend="and" projectIds> FIND_IN_SET(projectId, #{projectIds}) <if test=" prepend="and" memberRoles> FIND_IN_SET(memberRole, #{memberRoles})
mapper.insert:
insert into pm_project_supervision (id, projectId, projectCode, projectName, officeCode, type, channel, processTime, state, quesnaireId, deliverFileIds, remark, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy) values (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{officeCode}, #{type}, #{channel}, #{processTime}, #{state}, #{quesnaireId}, #{deliverFileIds}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy})
SELECT last_insert_id() as id ;
mapper.select:
SELECT m.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, sm.`memberName` as serviceManager, pm.`memberName` as programManagerA, pm2.`memberName` as programManagerB, IFNULL( CONCAT(m.createBy, "-", ui.realName), m.createBy ) AS createUser, bd.`basicDataName` AS typeName, qrt.* <if test=" hideFiles prepend=","> GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT(ff.`id`, "$$", ff.`fileName`) SEPARATOR "||" ) AS deliverFiles
FROM pm_project_supervision m LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON m.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = '20' AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm ON m.`projectId` = pm.`projectId` AND pm.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON m.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = '30' AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN projectSupervision_tempQuesnaireResultTable qrt ON qrt.quesnaireResultHeaderId = m.`quesnaireId` <if test=" hideFiles> LEFT JOIN `fnd_files` ff ON FIND_IN_SET(ff.id, m.`deliverFileIds`)
LEFT JOIN `fnd_user_info` ui ON ui.`username` = m.`createBy` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = m.`type` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'supervisionType' LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON d.`departmentNum` = m.`officeCode`
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.id"> m.id = #projectSupervision.id# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.projectId"> m.projectId = #projectSupervision.projectId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.projectCode"> m.projectCode like concat("%", #projectSupervision.projectCode#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.projectName"> m.projectName like concat("%", #projectSupervision.projectName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.officeCode"> m.officeCode = #projectSupervision.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.type"> m.type = #projectSupervision.type# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.channel"> m.channel like concat("%", #projectSupervision.channel#, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.processTime"> m.processTime = #projectSupervision.processTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.state"> m.state = #projectSupervision.state# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.isDelete"> m.isDelete = #projectSupervision.isDelete# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.quesnaireId"> m.quesnaireId = #projectSupervision.quesnaireId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.deliverFileIds"> m.deliverFileIds = #projectSupervision.deliverFileIds# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.remark"> m.remark = #projectSupervision.remark# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.createTime"> m.createTime = #projectSupervision.createTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.createBy"> m.createBy = #projectSupervision.createBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.updateTime"> m.updateTime = #projectSupervision.updateTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.updateBy"> m.updateBy = #projectSupervision.updateBy#
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.serviceManager"> sm.memberCode = #projectSupervision.serviceManager# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.programManager"> (pm.memberCode = #projectSupervision.programManager# or pm2.memberCode = #projectSupervision.programManager#)
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.userPower" open="(" close=")"> (sm.memberCode = #projectSupervision.userPower# or pm.memberCode = #projectSupervision.userPower# or pm2.memberCode = #projectSupervision.userPower#) <if test=" prepend="OR" property="projectSupervision.areaPower"> FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectSupervision.areaPower#)
<if test=" property="projectSupervision.userPower"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.areaPower"> FIND_IN_SET(m.officeCode, #projectSupervision.areaPower#)
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.processStartTime"> m.processTime >= #projectSupervision.processStartTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="projectSupervision.processEndTime"> m.processTime <= #projectSupervision.processEndTime#
GROUP BY m.id ORDER BY m.id desc <if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT pph.projectId,CASE WHEN pph.effectiveFrom < NOW() AND (pph.effectiveTo >= NOW() OR pph.effectiveTo IS NULL) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS projectStatus, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ppc.contractNo) AS contractNo, pph.projectCode, pph.compId, CASE WHEN ppgr.`mergeBranchMark` IS NULL THEN pph.projectName ELSE CONCAT( pph.projectName, '-',ppgr.`mergeBranchMark`) END AS projectName, pph.projectState, pph.isback, pph.column001, fd.departmentName AS officeName, pph.column002, pph.column003, pph.column004, pph.column005, pph.column006, pph.column007, pph.column008, pph.column009, pph.column010, pph.column011, CASE WHEN pph.column012 IS NULL OR pph.column012 = '' THEN pph.columno12_readonly ELSE pph.column012 END AS column012, pph.columno12_readonly AS column012Readonly, pph.column013, pph.column014, pph.salesType, CASE WHEN ppm1.memberCode IS NULL THEN ppm4.memberCode ELSE ppm1.memberCode END AS serviceManagerCode, CASE WHEN ppm1.memberName IS NULL THEN ppm4.memberName ELSE ppm1.memberName END AS serviceManagerCodeforjson, CASE WHEN ppm2.memberCode IS NULL THEN ppm5.memberCode ELSE ppm2.memberCode END AS programManagerCode, CASE WHEN ppm2.memberName IS NULL THEN ppm5.memberName ELSE ppm2.memberName END AS programManagerCodeforjson, ppm5.memberCode AS programManagerCodeB, ppm5.memberName AS programManagerCodeforjsonB, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ppm6.memberCode) AS teamMemberCodes, executionState.`basicDataName` AS executionStateName, ps.executionState, closeProcessState.`basicDataName` AS closeProcessStateName, ps.closeProcessState , pph.customInfo FROM pm_project_header pph LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm1 ON ppm1.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm1.memberRole = '20' AND ppm1.fromFlag = 1 AND (ppm1.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm1.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm4 ON ppm4.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm4.memberRole = '20' AND ppm4.fromFlag = 2 AND (ppm4.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm4.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm2 ON ppm2.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm2.memberRole = '30' AND ppm2.fromFlag = 1 AND (ppm2.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm2.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm5 ON ppm5.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm5.memberRole = '30' AND ppm5.fromFlag = 2 AND (ppm5.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm5.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_member ppm6 ON ppm6.projectId = pph.projectId AND ppm6.memberRole = '40' AND (ppm6.effectiveFrom <= NOW() AND (ppm6.effectiveTo IS NULL)) LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship ppgr ON ppgr.projectCode = pph.projectCode LEFT JOIN pm_project_contract ppc ON ppc.projectGroupCode = ppgr.projectGroupCode LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.departmentNum = pph.column001 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_state` ps ON ps.projectId = pph.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data executionState ON executionState.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectExecutionState' AND executionState.`basicDataId` = ps.`executionState` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data closeProcessState ON closeProcessState.`dataTypeCode` = 'projectCloseProcessState' AND closeProcessState.`basicDataId` = ps.`closeProcessState`
WHERE pph.projectId = #{projectId} LIMIT 1;
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS soleAgentProjectTable (KEY projectId(projectId)) SELECT DISTINCT ph.projectId, ph.projectCode, ph.projectName FROM `pm_project_header` ph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` ppfs ON ppfs.`projectCode` = LEFT(ph.`projectCode`, 15) INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT orderExecNumber FROM `pm_order_data_from_sap` ps WHERE ps.`orderType` = 0 AND ps.`salesType` = "14") t ON ppfs.`orderExecNumber` = t.orderExecNumber WHERE ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS newOrderContractInfoTable (KEY projectId(projectId)) SELECT DISTINCT ph.projectId, ph.`projectCode`, ph.`projectName`, ph.projectType, IFNULL( pods.`orderExecNumber`, ppfs.orderExecNumber ) orderExecNumber, pods2.`contractNo`, pods2.`salesType` FROM soleAgentProjectTable sph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON sph.projectId = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`pgr`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pgr.`projectGroupCode` = pc.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` pods ON pods.`contractNo` = pc.`contractNo` AND pods.`orderType` = 0 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` ppfs ON ppfs.`projectCode` = pgr.`smsProjectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` pods2 ON ( ( pods.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND (pods.`orderExecNumber` = pods2.`orderExecNumber` OR pods2.`orderExecNumber` = ppfs.`orderExecNumber`) AND pods2.`contractNo` != pods.`contractNo` AND pods2.`orderCreateTime` >= pods.`orderCreateTime` ) OR ( pods.`contractNo` IS NULL AND pods2.`orderExecNumber` = ppfs.`orderExecNumber` ) ) AND pods2.`orderType` = 0 WHERE ( ( pods2.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `pm_project_contract` `t1` JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` ON `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` JOIN `pm_project_header` `t3`
ON (
`t3`.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
AND `t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND ( `t3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) ) WHERE `pods2`.`contractNo` = `t1`.`contractNo`) ) )

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS oldOrderContractInfoTable (KEY projectId(projectId)) SELECT DISTINCT ph.projectId, ph.`projectCode`, ph.`projectName`, ph.projectType, pods.`orderExecNumber`, pods2.`contractNo`, pods2.`salesType` FROM soleAgentProjectTable sph LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON sph.projectId = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`pgr`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pgr.`projectGroupCode` = pc.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` pods ON pods.`contractNo` = pc.`contractNo` AND pods.`orderType` = 0 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_property_from_sms` ppfs ON ppfs.`projectCode` = pgr.`smsProjectCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` pods2 ON ( ( pods.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND (pods.`orderExecNumber` = pods2.`orderExecNumber` OR pods2.`orderExecNumber` = ppfs.`orderExecNumber`) AND pods2.`contractNo` != pods.`contractNo` AND pods2.`orderCreateTime` <= pods.`orderCreateTime` ) ) AND pods2.`orderType` = 0 WHERE ( ( pods2.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `pm_project_contract` `t1` JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `t2` ON `t1`.`projectGroupCode` = `t2`.`projectGroupCode` JOIN `pm_project_header` `t3`
ON (
`t3`.`projectCode` = REPLACE(`t2`.`projectCode`, "-his", "") )
AND `t3`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW() AND ( `t3`.`effectiveTo` > NOW() OR ISNULL(`t3`.`effectiveTo`) ) WHERE `pods2`.`contractNo` = `t1`.`contractNo`) ) )
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS soleAgentProjectTable;
DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS newOrderContractInfoTable;
DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS oldOrderContractInfoTable;
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT sph.* FROM soleAgentProjectTable sph LEFT JOIN newOrderContractInfoTable nci ON sph.projectId = nci.projectId LEFT JOIN oldOrderContractInfoTable oci ON sph.projectId = oci.projectId WHERE nci.projectId IS NOT NULL OR oci.projectId IS NOT NULL
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM newOrderContractInfoTable WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM oldOrderContractInfoTable WHERE projectId = #{projectId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE pm_project_group_relationship pgr LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON pgr.`projectCode` = ph.`projectCode` SET pgr.`projectCode` = CONCAT(pgr.`projectCode`, "-his"), pgr.updateTime = now(), pgr.updateBy = #{updateBy} WHERE ph.`projectId` = #{projectId} AND ( NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `pm_order_data_from_sap` pods
WHERE pods.`contractNo` = pc.`contractNo` AND pods.`orderType` = 0
) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM `pm_order_data_from_sap` pods WHERE pc.`contractNo` = pods.`contractNo` AND pods.`orderType` = 0 <if test=" prepend="AND" orderExecNumbers> pods.`orderExecNumber` IN
#orderExecNumbers[]#
<if test=" prepend="AND" contractNos> pods.`contractNo` NOT IN
#contractNos[]#
<if test=" prepend="AND" salesTypes> pods.`salesType` IN
#salesTypes[]#
) )
mapper.select: select * from pm_project_market_relations_from_sms

SELECT a.contractNo, bd.basicDataId AS smsDeliverType, bd.`basicDataName` AS deliverablesReq , MAX(IF(bd.`basicDataId` = d.basicDataName, uploadTime, NULL)) AS actualDate , GROUP_CONCAT(IF(bd.`basicDataId` = d.basicDataName, deliverableName, NULL)) AS deliverableNames , GROUP_CONCAT(IF(bd.`basicDataId` = d.basicDataName, deliverablePath, NULL)) AS deliverablePaths , fc.account AS dataAreaId FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` `a` LEFT JOIN `pm_basic_prj_deliver` `b` ON `a`.`deliverId` = `b`.`id` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `c` ON `b`.`dataTypeCodeSon` = `c`.`dataTypeCode` AND `b`.`basicDataIdSon` = `c`.`basicDataId` JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `d` ON `d`.`dataTypeCode` = '19' AND `b`.`basicDataIdSon` = `d`.`basicDataId` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.dataTypeCode = 'd365DeliverablesReq' LEFT JOIN pm_order_data_from_sap pod ON pod.contractNo = a.contractNo LEFT JOIN fnd_company fc ON fc.code = pod.compCode WHERE `a`.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND a.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND a.contractNo IN ( SELECT DISTINCT contractNo FROM `pm_basic_deliver_detail` WHERE #{dateDiff} >= DATEDIFF(NOW(), IFNULL(effectiveTo, uploadTime)) ) GROUP BY contractNo, smsDeliverType

SELECT itr.* FROM () sp INNER JOIN pm_project_incident_table_from_itr itr ON sp.barCode = itr.barCode AND sp.contractNo = itr.contractNo
<if test=" prepend="AND" projectCode> itr.projectCode = #{projectCode} <if test=" prepend="AND" contractNoList> itr.contractNo in ( #contractNoList[]# )

select * from pm_project_license_info_from_license lic
<if test=" prepend="AND" contract> lic.contract = #{contract} <if test=" prepend="AND" contractNoList> lic.contract IN ( #contractNoList[]# )
